sentences.chinese: 王先生要不要喝咖啡？
sentences.pinyin: Wáng xiānshēng yào bù yào hē kāfēi?
sentences.english: Does Mr. Wang want to drink coffee?

sentences.chinese: 這是不是烏龍茶？
sentences.pinyin: Zhè shì bù shì Wūlóng chá?
sentences.english: Is this oolong tea?

sentences.chinese: 臺灣人喜歡不喜歡喝茶？
sentences.pinyin: Táiwān rén xǐhuān bù xǐhuān hē chá?
sentences.english: Do Taiwanese people like drinking tea?

sentences.chinese: 他喝咖啡。他喝不喝咖啡？
sentences.pinyin: Tā hē kāfēi. Tā hē bù hē kāfēi?
sentences.english: He drinks coffee. Does he drink coffee?

sentences.chinese: 你是日本人。你是不是日本人？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì Rìběn rén. Nǐ shì bù shì Rìběn rén?
sentences.english: You are Japanese. Are you Japanese?

sentences.chinese: 他來臺灣。他來不來臺灣？
sentences.pinyin: Tā lái Táiwān. Tā lái bù lái Táiwān?
sentences.english: He is coming to Taiwan. Is he coming to Taiwan?

sentences.chinese: 你好嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo ma?
sentences.english: How are you?

sentences.chinese: 你來接我們嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ lái jiē wǒmen ma?
sentences.english: Are you coming to pick us up?

sentences.chinese: 他是日本人嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì Rìběn rén ma?
sentences.english: Is he Japanese?

sentences.chinese: 他不姓陳嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù xìng Chén ma?
sentences.english: Isn’t his last name Chen?

sentences.chinese: 你不是臺灣人嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ bù shì Táiwān rén ma?
sentences.english: Aren’t you Taiwanese?

sentences.chinese: 他不喝咖啡嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù hē kāfēi ma?
sentences.english: Doesn’t he drink coffee?

sentences.chinese: 你好嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo ma?
sentences.english: How are you?

sentences.chinese: 你要喝茶嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yào hē chá ma?
sentences.english: Do you want to drink tea?

sentences.chinese: 你們要不要喝烏龍茶？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen yào bù yào hē Wūlóng chá?
sentences.english: Do you (all) want to drink oolong tea?

sentences.chinese: 他是不是臺灣人？／他是臺灣人嗎？是，他是臺灣人。
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì bù shì Táiwān rén? / Tā shì Táiwān rén ma? Shì, tā shì Táiwān rén.
sentences.english: Is he Taiwanese? / Is he Taiwanese? Yes, he is Taiwanese.

sentences.chinese: 你喜不喜歡臺灣？／你喜歡臺灣嗎？ 喜歡，我喜歡臺灣。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xǐ bù xǐhuān Táiwān? / Nǐ xǐhuān Táiwān ma? Xǐhuān, wǒ xǐhuān Táiwān.
sentences.english: Do you like Taiwan? / Do you like Taiwan? Yes, I like Taiwan.

sentences.chinese: 王先生是不是日本人?／王先生是日本人嗎？是，王先生是日本人。
sentences.pinyin: Wáng xiānshēng shì bù shì Rìběn rén? / Wáng xiānshēng shì Rìběn rén ma? Shì, Wáng xiānshēng shì Rìběn rén.
sentences.english: Is Mr. Wang Japanese? / Is Mr. Wang Japanese? Yes, Mr. Wang is Japanese.

sentences.chinese: 他喝不喝烏龍茶？／他喝烏龍茶嗎？喝，他喝烏龍茶。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hē bù hē Wūlóng chá? / Tā hē Wūlóng chá ma? Hē, tā hē Wūlóng chá.
sentences.english: Does he drink oolong tea? / Does he drink oolong tea? Yes, he drinks oolong tea.

sentences.chinese: 你是王先生嗎？是。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì Wáng xiānshēng ma? Shì.
sentences.english: Are you Mr. Wang? Yes.

sentences.chinese: 他來不來臺灣？來。
sentences.pinyin: Tā lái bù lái Táiwān? Lái.
sentences.english: Is he coming to Taiwan? Yes.

sentences.chinese: 他喜歡不喜歡喝茶？喜歡。
sentences.pinyin: Tā xǐhuān bù xǐhuān hē chá? Xǐhuān.
sentences.english: Does he like drinking tea? Yes.

sentences.chinese: 他是不是李先生？不是，他不是李先生。
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì bù shì Lǐ xiānshēng? Bù shì, tā bù shì Lǐ xiānshēng.
sentences.english: Is he Mr. Li? No, he is not Mr. Li.

sentences.chinese: 王先生喝茶嗎？不，他不喝。
sentences.pinyin: Wáng xiānshēng hē chá ma? Bù, tā bù hē.
sentences.english: Does Mr. Wang drink tea? No, he doesn’t.

sentences.chinese: 李小姐是不是臺灣人？不是，李小姐不是臺灣人。
sentences.pinyin: Lǐ xiǎojiě shì bù shì Táiwān rén? Bù shì, Lǐ xiǎojiě bù shì Táiwān rén.
sentences.english: Is Miss Li Taiwanese? No, Miss Li is not Taiwanese.

sentences.chinese: 要不要喝咖啡？不要。
sentences.pinyin: Yào bù yào hē kāfēi? Bù yào.
sentences.english: Do you want to drink coffee? No.

sentences.chinese: 你喜歡不喜歡喝烏龍茶？不喜歡。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuān bù xǐhuān hē Wūlóng chá? Bù xǐhuān.
sentences.english: Do you like drinking oolong tea? No, I don’t.

sentences.chinese: 陳小姐是不是美國人？不是。
sentences.pinyin: Chén xiǎojiě shì bù shì Měiguó rén? Bù shì.
sentences.english: Is Miss Chen American? No.

sentences.chinese: 我很好。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: I’m very good.

sentences.chinese: 他很喜歡臺灣。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hěn xǐhuān Táiwān.
sentences.english: He really likes Taiwan.

sentences.chinese: 臺灣人很喜歡喝烏龍茶。
sentences.pinyin: Táiwān rén hěn xǐhuān hē Wūlóng chá.
sentences.english: Taiwanese people really like drinking oolong tea.

sentences.chinese: 烏龍茶很好喝。
sentences.pinyin: Wūlóng chá hěn hǎo hē.
sentences.english: Oolong tea is very delicious.

sentences.chinese: 他很喜歡日本人。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hěn xǐhuān Rìběn rén.
sentences.english: He really likes Japanese people.

sentences.chinese: 我們很好。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: We are very good.

sentences.chinese: 我要喝茶，你呢？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yào hē chá, nǐ ne?
sentences.english: I want to drink tea, how about you?

sentences.chinese: 他不喝咖啡，陳小姐呢？
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù hē kāfēi, Chén xiǎojiě ne?
sentences.english: He doesn’t drink coffee, how about Miss Chen?

sentences.chinese: 王先生是日本人，李先生呢？
sentences.pinyin: Wáng xiānshēng shì Rìběn rén, Lǐ xiānshēng ne?
sentences.english: Mr. Wang is Japanese, how about Mr. Li?

sentences.chinese: 他是美國人，你呢？
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì Měiguó rén, nǐ ne?
sentences.english: He is American, how about you?

sentences.chinese: 他喜歡我們，你呢？
sentences.pinyin: Tā xǐhuān wǒmen, nǐ ne?
sentences.english: He likes us, how about you?

sentences.chinese: 你喜歡喝茶，咖啡呢？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuān hē chá, kāfēi ne?
sentences.english: You like drinking tea, how about coffee?

sentences.chinese: 他不喝咖啡，茶呢？
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù hē kāfēi, chá ne?
sentences.english: He doesn’t drink coffee, how about tea?

sentences.chinese: 我的書
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de shū
sentences.english: My book

sentences.chinese: 你們的照片
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen de zhàopiàn
sentences.english: Your (plural) photos

sentences.chinese: 李老師的姐姐
sentences.pinyin: Lǐ lǎoshī de jiějiě
sentences.english: Teacher Li’s older sister

sentences.chinese: 哥哥的老師
sentences.pinyin: Gēgē de lǎoshī
sentences.english: Older brother’s teacher

sentences.chinese: 我媽媽
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ māma
sentences.english: My mom

sentences.chinese: 我們老師
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen lǎoshī
sentences.english: Our teacher

sentences.chinese: 漂亮的小姐
sentences.pinyin: Piàoliàng de xiǎojiě
sentences.english: A beautiful lady

sentences.chinese: 好喝的咖啡
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo hē de kāfēi
sentences.english: Delicious coffee

sentences.chinese: 很好看的房子
sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo kàn de fángzi
sentences.english: A very nice-looking house

sentences.chinese: 我有很多照片。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yǒu hěn duō zhàopiàn.
sentences.english: I have many photos.

sentences.chinese: 他們有好喝的茶。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen yǒu hǎo hē de chá.
sentences.english: They have delicious tea.

sentences.chinese: 他沒有房子。
sentences.pinyin: Tā méiyǒu fángzi.
sentences.english: He doesn’t have a house.

sentences.chinese: 我沒有書。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ méiyǒu shū.
sentences.english: I don’t have books.

sentences.chinese: 對不起，我們沒有烏龍茶。
sentences.pinyin: Duìbùqǐ, wǒmen méiyǒu Wūlóng chá.
sentences.english: Sorry, we don’t have oolong tea.

sentences.chinese: 我沒有兄弟姐妹。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ méiyǒu xiōngdì jiěmèi.
sentences.english: I don’t have siblings.

sentences.chinese: 你們有沒有好喝的咖啡？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen yǒu méiyǒu hǎo hē de kāfēi?
sentences.english: Do you (all) have delicious coffee?

sentences.chinese: 你們有烏龍茶嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen yǒu Wūlóng chá ma?
sentences.english: Do you (all) have oolong tea?

sentences.chinese: 你有幾張照片？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu jǐ zhāng zhàopiàn?
sentences.english: How many photos do you have?

sentences.chinese: 我們都姓陳。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen dōu xìng Chén.
sentences.english: Our last name is all Chen.

sentences.chinese: 他的兄弟姐妹都很好看。
sentences.pinyin: Tā de xiōngdì jiěmèi dōu hěn hǎo kàn.
sentences.english: His siblings are all very good-looking.

sentences.chinese: 這兩個房子都是他的（房子）。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè liǎng gè fángzi dōu shì tā de (fángzi).
sentences.english: These two houses are both his (houses).

sentences.chinese: 我們都是美國人。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen dōu shì Měiguó rén.
sentences.english: We are all Americans.

sentences.chinese: 你爸爸媽媽都要喝咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ bàba māma dōu yào hē kāfēi.
sentences.english: Your dad and mom both want to drink coffee.

sentences.chinese: 李先生、陳小姐都喜歡喝茶。
sentences.pinyin: Lǐ xiānshēng, Chén xiǎojiě dōu xǐhuān hē chá.
sentences.english: Mr. Li and Miss Chen both like drinking tea.

sentences.chinese: 我們都不是美國人。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen dōu bú shì Měiguó rén.
sentences.english: None of us are Americans.

sentences.chinese: 我哥哥、我姊姊都不喜歡照相。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gēgē, wǒ jiějiě dōu bù xǐhuān zhàoxiàng.
sentences.english: My older brother and older sister both don’t like taking photos.

sentences.chinese: 我們都沒有哥哥。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen dōu méiyǒu gēgē.
sentences.english: None of us have an older brother.

sentences.chinese: 你們都是美國人嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen dōu shì Měiguó rén ma?
sentences.english: Are you all Americans?

sentences.chinese: 你的家人都要喝咖啡嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ de jiārén dōu yào hē kāfēi ma?
sentences.english: Do all your family members want to drink coffee?

sentences.chinese: 一個哥哥
sentences.pinyin: Yí gè gēgē
sentences.english: One older brother

sentences.chinese: 兩張好看的照片
sentences.pinyin: Liǎng zhāng hǎo kàn de zhàopiàn
sentences.english: Two nice-looking photos

sentences.chinese: 幾個老師？
sentences.pinyin: Jǐ gè lǎoshī?
sentences.english: How many teachers?

sentences.chinese: 哪三個人？
sentences.pinyin: Nǎ sān gè rén?
sentences.english: Which three people?

sentences.chinese: 三個人
sentences.pinyin: Sān gè rén
sentences.english: Three people

sentences.chinese: 幾張照片？
sentences.pinyin: Jǐ zhāng zhàopiàn?
sentences.english: How many photos?

sentences.chinese: 哪一張照片？
sentences.pinyin: Nǎ yì zhāng zhàopiàn?
sentences.english: Which photo?

sentences.chinese: 我們今天去看電影。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen jīntiān qù kàn diànyǐng.
sentences.english: We are going to watch a movie today.

sentences.chinese: 你明天想去游泳嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ míngtiān xiǎng qù yóuyǒng ma?
sentences.english: Do you want to go swimming tomorrow?

sentences.chinese: 週末他要去打籃球。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōumò tā yào qù dǎ lánqiú.
sentences.english: He is going to play basketball on the weekend.

sentences.chinese: 明天你想做什麼？
sentences.pinyin: Míngtiān nǐ xiǎng zuò shénme?
sentences.english: What do you want to do tomorrow?

sentences.chinese: 我去打網球。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qù dǎ wǎngqiú.
sentences.english: I’m going to play tennis.

sentences.chinese: 他去踢足球。
sentences.pinyin: Tā qù tī zúqiú.
sentences.english: He is going to play soccer.

sentences.chinese: 我們和老師都去看電影。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen hé lǎoshī dōu qù kàn diànyǐng.
sentences.english: Our teacher and we are all going to watch a movie.

sentences.chinese: 我不去打籃球。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bù qù dǎ lánqiú.
sentences.english: I am not going to play basketball.

sentences.chinese: 明天早上我不去游泳。
sentences.pinyin: Míngtiān zǎoshàng wǒ bù qù yóuyǒng.
sentences.english: I am not going swimming tomorrow morning.

sentences.chinese: 你要去看電影嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yào qù kàn diànyǐng ma?
sentences.english: Do you want to watch a movie?

sentences.chinese: 你們常去吃越南菜嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen cháng qù chī Yuènán cài ma?
sentences.english: Do you often eat Vietnamese food?

sentences.chinese: 他不去打棒球嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù qù dǎ bàngqiú ma?
sentences.english: Is he not going to play baseball?

sentences.chinese: 臺灣人喜歡喝烏龍茶嗎？烏龍茶，臺灣人都喜歡喝。
sentences.pinyin: Táiwān rén xǐhuān hē Wūlóng chá ma? Wūlóng chá, Táiwān rén dōu xǐhuān hē.
sentences.english: Do Taiwanese people like drinking oolong tea? Oolong tea, all Taiwanese people like to drink.

sentences.chinese: 你有哥哥、姐姐嗎？哥哥、姐姐，我都沒有。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu gēgē, jiějiě ma? Gēgē, jiějiě, wǒ dōu méiyǒu.
sentences.english: Do you have an older brother or sister? I don’t have an older brother or sister.

sentences.chinese: 你想看美國電影還是臺灣電影？美國電影、臺灣電影，我都想看。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng kàn Měiguó diànyǐng háishì Táiwān diànyǐng? Měiguó diànyǐng, Táiwān diànyǐng, wǒ dōu xiǎng kàn.
sentences.english: Do you want to watch an American movie or a Taiwanese movie? I want to watch both American and Taiwanese movies.

sentences.chinese: 打棒球，我不喜歡。
sentences.pinyin: Dǎ bàngqiú, wǒ bù xǐhuān.
sentences.english: Playing baseball, I don’t like it.

sentences.chinese: 越南菜，我常吃。
sentences.pinyin: Yuènán cài, wǒ cháng chī.
sentences.english: Vietnamese food, I often eat it.

sentences.chinese: 這張照片，我覺得很好看。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhāng zhàopiàn, wǒ juéde hěn hǎo kàn.
sentences.english: This photo, I think it looks very nice.

sentences.chinese: 中國菜，我都喜歡吃。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōngguó cài, wǒ dōu xǐhuān chī.
sentences.english: Chinese food, I like eating all of it.

sentences.chinese: 弟弟、妹妹，我都有。
sentences.pinyin: Dìdì, mèimei, wǒ dōu yǒu.
sentences.english: I have both a younger brother and a younger sister.

sentences.chinese: 我是美國人,他也是美國人。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ shì Měiguó rén, tā yě shì Měiguó rén.
sentences.english: I am American, and he is also American.

sentences.chinese: 我姐姐很漂亮,我妹妹也很漂亮。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jiějiě hěn piàoliàng, wǒ mèimei yě hěn piàoliàng.
sentences.english: My older sister is very beautiful, and my younger sister is also very beautiful.

sentences.chinese: 我和王老師都喜歡他。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ hé Wáng lǎoshī dōu xǐhuān tā.
sentences.english: Teacher Wang and I both like him.

sentences.chinese: 你家人都很好看。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jiārén dōu hěn hǎo kàn.
sentences.english: Your family members are all good-looking.

sentences.chinese: 我常打網球。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ cháng dǎ wǎngqiú.
sentences.english: I often play tennis.

sentences.chinese: 我是日本人,他們也都 是日本人。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ shì Rìběn rén, tāmen yě dōu shì Rìběn rén.
sentences.english: I am Japanese, and they are also all Japanese.

sentences.chinese: 我家人喜歡照相,他家人也都喜歡照相。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jiārén xǐhuān zhàoxiàng, tā jiārén yě dōu xǐhuān zhàoxiàng.
sentences.english: My family likes taking photos, and his family also likes taking photos.

sentences.chinese: 你很喜歡吃越南菜，我們也都很喜歡吃越南菜。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hěn xǐhuān chī Yuènán cài, wǒmen yě dōu hěn xǐhuān chī Yuènán cài.
sentences.english: You really like eating Vietnamese food, and we all really like eating Vietnamese food too.

sentences.chinese: 你常喝咖啡,我也常喝咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ cháng hē kāfēi, wǒ yě cháng hē kāfēi.
sentences.english: You often drink coffee, and I also often drink coffee.

sentences.chinese: 你常去踢足球，我們也都常去踢足球。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ cháng qù tī zúqiú, wǒmen yě dōu cháng qù tī zúqiú.
sentences.english: You often go play soccer, and we all also often go play soccer.

sentences.chinese: 我不是日本人，他也不是日本人。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bú shì Rìběn rén, tā yě bú shì Rìběn rén.
sentences.english: I am not Japanese, and he is also not Japanese.

sentences.chinese: 我沒有弟弟，也沒有妹妹。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ méiyǒu dìdì, yě méiyǒu mèimei.
sentences.english: I don’t have a younger brother or a younger sister either.

sentences.chinese: 他不喜歡看電影，我也不喜歡看電影。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù xǐhuān kàn diànyǐng, wǒ yě bù xǐhuān kàn diànyǐng.
sentences.english: He doesn’t like watching movies, and I don’t like watching movies either.

sentences.chinese: 我不常看電影。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bù cháng kàn diànyǐng.
sentences.english: I don’t often watch movies.

sentences.chinese: 他們不都是美國人。（有美國人，也有日本人）
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen bú dōu shì Měiguó rén. (Yǒu Měiguó rén, yě yǒu Rìběn rén.)
sentences.english: Not all of them are Americans. (Some are Americans, some are Japanese.)

sentences.chinese: 我們去喝咖啡還是喝茶？我們去喝咖啡吧。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen qù hē kāfēi háishì hē chá? Wǒmen qù hē kāfēi ba.
sentences.english: Should we go drink coffee or tea? Let’s go drink coffee.

sentences.chinese: 今天晚上我們看什麼電影？我們去看臺灣電影吧！
sentences.pinyin: Jīntiān wǎnshàng wǒmen kàn shénme diànyǐng? Wǒmen qù kàn Táiwān diànyǐng ba!
sentences.english: What movie are we watching tonight? Let’s go watch a Taiwanese movie!

sentences.chinese: 週末我們去打籃球，好不好？我不喜歡打籃球，我們打網球吧！
sentences.pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù dǎ lánqiú, hǎo bù hǎo? Wǒ bù xǐhuān dǎ lánqiú, wǒmen dǎ wǎngqiú ba!
sentences.english: Shall we go play basketball on the weekend? I don’t like playing basketball, let’s play tennis instead!

sentences.chinese: 一杯咖啡
sentences.pinyin: Yì bēi kāfēi
sentences.english: One cup of coffee

sentences.chinese: 十支手機
sentences.pinyin: Shí zhī shǒujī
sentences.english: Ten mobile phones

sentences.chinese: 三個弟弟
sentences.pinyin: Sān ge dìdì
sentences.english: Three younger brothers

sentences.chinese: 這兩杯熱咖啡一共多少錢？
sentences.pinyin: Zhè liǎng bēi rè kāfēi yígòng duōshǎo qián?
sentences.english: How much do these two cups of hot coffee cost in total?

sentences.chinese: 那三支手機太舊了。
sentences.pinyin: Nà sān zhī shǒujī tài jiù le.
sentences.english: Those three mobile phones are too old.

sentences.chinese: 哪（一） 種手機不貴？
sentences.pinyin: Nǎ (yì) zhǒng shǒujī bù guì?
sentences.english: Which type of mobile phone is not expensive?

sentences.chinese: 請幫我微波包子。
sentences.pinyin: Qǐng bāng wǒ wēibō bāozi.
sentences.english: Please microwave the buns for me.

sentences.chinese: 請幫我買一杯咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Qǐng bāng wǒ mǎi yì bēi kāfēi.
sentences.english: Please help me buy a cup of coffee.

sentences.chinese: 請幫我照相。
sentences.pinyin: Qǐng bāng wǒ zhàoxiàng.
sentences.english: Please take a photo for me.

sentences.chinese: 他不幫我微波包子。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù bāng wǒ wēibō bāozi.
sentences.english: He doesn’t help me microwave the buns.

sentences.chinese: 姐姐不幫弟弟買咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Jiějiě bù bāng dìdì mǎi kāfēi.
sentences.english: The older sister doesn’t help the younger brother buy coffee.

sentences.chinese: 王先生不幫我照相。
sentences.pinyin: Wáng xiānshēng bù bāng wǒ zhàoxiàng.
sentences.english: Mr. Wang doesn’t help me take a photo.

sentences.chinese: 你幫不幫他買手機？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ bāng bù bāng tā mǎi shǒujī?
sentences.english: Will you help him buy a mobile phone?

sentences.chinese: 他幫你照相嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tā bāng nǐ zhàoxiàng ma?
sentences.english: Does he take photos for you?

sentences.chinese: 誰能幫安同微波包子？
sentences.pinyin: Shéi néng bāng Āntóng wēibō bāozi?
sentences.english: Who can help Antong microwave the buns?

sentences.chinese: 你要買新手機還是舊手機？我要新的，不要舊的。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yào mǎi xīn shǒujī háishì jiù shǒujī? Wǒ yào xīn de, bú yào jiù de.
sentences.english: Do you want to buy a new mobile phone or an old one? I want a new one, not an old one.

sentences.chinese: 新手機貴不貴？新的很貴。
sentences.pinyin: Xīn shǒujī guì bú guì? Xīn de hěn guì.
sentences.english: Are new mobile phones expensive? New ones are very expensive.

sentences.chinese: 你的手機不是新的。這杯咖啡不熱，我要熱的。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ de shǒujī bú shì xīn de. Zhè bēi kāfēi bú rè, wǒ yào rè de.
sentences.english: Your mobile phone is not new. This cup of coffee is not hot, I want a hot one.

sentences.chinese: 房子很貴，我不買大的。
sentences.pinyin: Fángzi hěn guì, wǒ bú mǎi dà de.
sentences.english: Houses are very expensive, I won’t buy a big one.

sentences.chinese: 房子，你喜歡新的嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Fángzi, nǐ xǐhuān xīn de ma?
sentences.english: Houses, do you like new ones?

sentences.chinese: 手機，他買不買舊的？
sentences.pinyin: Shǒujī, tā mǎi bú mǎi jiù de?
sentences.english: Mobile phones, does he buy old ones?

sentences.chinese: 咖啡，你要熱的嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Kāfēi, nǐ yào rè de ma?
sentences.english: Coffee, do you want a hot one?

sentences.chinese: 太貴了。
sentences.pinyin: Tài guì le.
sentences.english: Too expensive.

sentences.chinese: 太大了。
sentences.pinyin: Tài dà le.
sentences.english: Too big.

sentences.chinese: 太熱了。
sentences.pinyin: Tài rè le.
sentences.english: Too hot.

sentences.chinese: 新手機能上網。
sentences.pinyin: Xīn shǒujī néng shàngwǎng.
sentences.english: New mobile phones can access the internet.

sentences.chinese: 那支手機能照相。
sentences.pinyin: Nà zhī shǒujī néng zhàoxiàng.
sentences.english: That mobile phone can take photos.

sentences.chinese: 我的手機不能上網。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de shǒujī bù néng shàngwǎng.
sentences.english: My mobile phone cannot access the internet.

sentences.chinese: 誰的手機不能照相？
sentences.pinyin: Shéi de shǒujī bù néng zhàoxiàng?
sentences.english: Whose mobile phone cannot take photos?

sentences.chinese: 你的手機能不能照相？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ de shǒujī néng bù néng zhàoxiàng?
sentences.english: Can your mobile phone take photos?

sentences.chinese: 舊的能不能上網？
sentences.pinyin: Jiù de néng bù néng shàngwǎng?
sentences.english: Can the old one access the internet?

sentences.chinese: 那支手機能不能上網？
sentences.pinyin: Nà zhī shǒujī néng bù néng shàngwǎng?
sentences.english: Can that mobile phone access the internet?

sentences.chinese: 二十多個人
sentences.pinyin: Èrshí duō ge rén
sentences.english: More than twenty people

sentences.chinese: 五萬多支手機。
sentences.pinyin: Wǔ wàn duō zhī shǒujī.
sentences.english: More than fifty thousand mobile phones.

sentences.chinese: 二十多個人
sentences.pinyin: Èrshí duō ge rén
sentences.english: More than twenty people.

sentences.chinese: 一千多支手機
sentences.pinyin: Yì qiān duō zhī shǒujī
sentences.english: More than one thousand mobile phones.

sentences.chinese: 五百多個包子
sentences.pinyin: Wǔ bǎi duō ge bāozi
sentences.english: More than five hundred buns.

sentences.chinese: 三萬四千多塊錢
sentences.pinyin: Sān wàn sì qiān duō kuài qián
sentences.english: More than thirty-four thousand dollars.

sentences.chinese: 五塊多(錢)。
sentences.pinyin: Wǔ kuài duō (qián).
sentences.english: A little more than five dollars.

sentences.chinese: 一塊多(錢)。
sentences.pinyin: Yí kuài duō (qián).
sentences.english: A little more than one dollar.

sentences.chinese: 這碗牛肉麵有一點辣。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè wǎn niúròumiàn yǒu yìdiǎn là.
sentences.english: This bowl of beef noodle soup is a little spicy.

sentences.chinese: 那支手機有一點貴。
sentences.pinyin: Nà zhī shǒujī yǒu yìdiǎn guì.
sentences.english: That mobile phone is a little expensive.

sentences.chinese: 他的房子有一點舊。
sentences.pinyin: Tā de fángzi yǒu yìdiǎn jiù.
sentences.english: His house is a little old.

sentences.chinese: 他學中文學得不錯。
sentences.pinyin: Tā xué Zhōngwén xué de búcuò.
sentences.english: He learns Chinese quite well.

sentences.chinese: 王伯母做越南菜做得很好。
sentences.pinyin: Wáng bómǔ zuò Yuènán cài zuò de hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: Aunt Wang cooks Vietnamese food very well.

sentences.chinese: 你做得很好。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuò de hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: You did very well.

sentences.chinese: 這種手機賣得很好。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng shǒujī mài de hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: This type of mobile phone sells well.

sentences.chinese: 你做飯做得真好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuò fàn zuò de zhēn hǎochī.
sentences.english: You cook really delicious food.

sentences.chinese: 我的老師教中文教得很好。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de lǎoshī jiāo Zhōngwén jiāo de hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: My teacher teaches Chinese very well.

sentences.chinese: 飯，他做得真好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Fàn, tā zuò de zhēn hǎochī.
sentences.english: Food, he cooks really delicious.

sentences.chinese: 中文，你說得很好。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōngwén, nǐ shuō de hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: Chinese, you speak very well.

sentences.chinese: 這種甜點，他做得很好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng tiándiǎn, tā zuò de hěn hǎochī.
sentences.english: This kind of dessert, he makes very delicious.

sentences.chinese: 這支手機賣得很便宜。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhī shǒujī mài de hěn piányí.
sentences.english: This mobile phone is sold very cheaply.

sentences.chinese: 他做甜點做得不好。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zuò tiándiǎn zuò de bù hǎo.
sentences.english: He does not make desserts well.

sentences.chinese: 王先生打網球打得不好。
sentences.pinyin: Wáng xiānshēng dǎ wǎngqiú dǎ de bù hǎo.
sentences.english: Mr. Wang doesn’t play tennis well.

sentences.chinese: 他的咖啡賣得不好。
sentences.pinyin: Tā de kāfēi mài de bù hǎo.
sentences.english: His coffee doesn’t sell well.

sentences.chinese: 越南菜，這家店做得不好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Yuènán cài, zhè jiā diàn zuò de bù hǎochī.
sentences.english: Vietnamese food, this restaurant doesn’t make it tasty.

sentences.chinese: 他做飯做得怎麼樣？
sentences.pinyin: Tā zuò fàn zuò de zěnmeyàng?
sentences.english: How is his cooking?

sentences.chinese: 他打籃球打得好嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tā dǎ lánqiú dǎ de hǎo ma?
sentences.english: Does he play basketball well?

sentences.chinese: 中文，他說得好不好？
sentences.pinyin: Zhōngwén, tā shuō de hǎo bù hǎo?
sentences.english: Chinese, does he speak well or not?

sentences.chinese: 陳小姐會做飯。
sentences.pinyin: Chén xiǎojiě huì zuò fàn.
sentences.english: Miss Chen can cook.

sentences.chinese: 他哥哥會踢足球。
sentences.pinyin: Tā gēgē huì tī zúqiú.
sentences.english: His older brother can play soccer.

sentences.chinese: 他們兄弟姊妹都會游泳。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen xiōngdì jiěmèi dōu huì yóuyǒng.
sentences.english: His siblings all know how to swim.

sentences.chinese: 他的媽媽不會做飯。
sentences.pinyin: Tā de māma bú huì zuò fàn.
sentences.english: His mom can’t cook.

sentences.chinese: 我媽媽不會做甜點。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ māma bú huì zuò tiándiǎn.
sentences.english: My mom can’t make desserts.

sentences.chinese: 我的家人都不會打棒球。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de jiārén dōu bú huì dǎ bàngqiú.
sentences.english: My family members all can’t play baseball.

sentences.chinese: 你會做甜點嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ huì zuò tiándiǎn ma?
sentences.english: Can you make desserts?

sentences.chinese: 他弟弟會踢足球嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tā dìdì huì tī zúqiú ma?
sentences.english: Can his younger brother play soccer?

sentences.chinese: 你會不會說中文？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ huì bú huì shuō Zhōngwén?
sentences.english: Can you speak Chinese?

sentences.chinese: 你的姐姐會不會做飯？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ de jiějiě huì bú huì zuò fàn?
sentences.english: Can your older sister cook?

sentences.chinese: 他這個週末到臺灣來。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zhège zhōumò dào Táiwān lái.
sentences.english: He is coming to Taiwan this weekend.

sentences.chinese:
老師明天到臺北來。我們要和他一起吃晚
飯。
sentences.pinyin: Lǎoshī míngtiān dào Táiběi lái. Wǒmen yào hé tā yìqǐ chī wǎnfàn.
sentences.english: The teacher is coming to Taipei tomorrow. We are going to have dinner with him.

sentences.chinese: 想吃牛肉麵嗎？明天我們可以到那家店去。
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎng chī niúròumiàn ma? Míngtiān wǒmen kěyǐ dào nà jiā diàn qù.
sentences.english: Want to eat beef noodle soup? Tomorrow we can go to that restaurant.

sentences.chinese: 我可以教你中文，明天到我家來吧！
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ kěyǐ jiāo nǐ Zhōngwén, míngtiān dào wǒ jiā lái ba!
sentences.english: I can teach you Chinese, come to my house tomorrow!

sentences.chinese: 王先生明天不到臺北來。
sentences.pinyin: Wáng xiānshēng míngtiān bú dào Táiběi lái.
sentences.english: Mr. Wang is not coming to Taipei tomorrow.

sentences.chinese: 那家的越南菜不好吃。他們不到那家餐廳去。
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiā de Yuènán cài bù hǎochī. Tāmen bú dào nà jiā cāntīng qù.
sentences.english: The Vietnamese food at that restaurant is not tasty. They do not go to that restaurant.

sentences.chinese: 他晚上去看電影，不到我家來，你呢？
sentences.pinyin: Tā wǎnshàng qù kàn diànyǐng, bú dào wǒ jiā lái, nǐ ne?
sentences.english: He is going to watch a movie at night, not coming to my house. What about you?

sentences.chinese: 你妹妹到不到臺灣來？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ mèimei dào bú dào Táiwān lái?
sentences.english: Is your younger sister coming to Taiwan or not?

sentences.chinese: 他們到不到我家來？
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen dào bú dào wǒ jiā lái?
sentences.english: Are they coming to my house or not?

sentences.chinese: 這麼多家餐廳，我們要到哪一家？
sentences.pinyin: Zhème duō jiā cāntīng, wǒmen yào dào nǎ yì jiā?
sentences.english: So many restaurants, which one should we go to?

sentences.chinese: 他們明天晚上要到王老師家。你想去嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen míngtiān wǎnshàng yào dào Wáng lǎoshī jiā. Nǐ xiǎng qù ma?
sentences.english: They are going to Teacher Wang’s house tomorrow night. Do you want to go?

sentences.chinese: 歡迎你到我家。
sentences.pinyin: Huānyíng nǐ dào wǒ jiā.
sentences.english: Welcome to my home.

sentences.chinese: 我在臺灣。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zài Táiwān.
sentences.english: I am in Taiwan.

sentences.chinese: 他們學校在花蓮。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen xuéxiào zài Huālián.
sentences.english: Their school is in Hualien.

sentences.chinese: 餐廳在宿舍的一樓。
sentences.pinyin: Cāntīng zài sùshè de yī lóu.
sentences.english: The restaurant is on the first floor of the dormitory.

sentences.chinese: 我們學校在臺北。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen xuéxiào zài Táiběi.
sentences.english: Our school is in Taipei.

sentences.chinese: 我爸爸早上在學校。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bàba zǎoshàng zài xuéxiào.
sentences.english: My dad is at school in the morning.

sentences.chinese: 他在外面。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zài wàimiàn.
sentences.english: He is outside.

sentences.chinese: 圖書館在後面。
sentences.pinyin: Túshūguǎn zài hòumiàn.
sentences.english: The library is in the back.

sentences.chinese: 我在宿舍裡面。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zài sùshè lǐmiàn.
sentences.english: I am inside the dormitory.

sentences.chinese: 那家店在你家附近嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiā diàn zài nǐ jiā fùjìn ma?
sentences.english: Is that store near your house?

sentences.chinese: 咖啡店在宿舍的旁邊，不在裡面。
sentences.pinyin: Kāfēidiàn zài sùshè de pángbiān, bú zài lǐmiàn.
sentences.english: The café is next to the dormitory, not inside.

sentences.chinese: 游泳池在圖書館的後面，不在前面。
sentences.pinyin: Yóuyǒngchí zài túshūguǎn de hòumiàn, bú zài qiánmiàn.
sentences.english: The swimming pool is behind the library, not in front.

sentences.chinese: 他和朋友在圖書館後面的咖啡店。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hé péngyǒu zài túshūguǎn hòumiàn de kāfēidiàn.
sentences.english: He and his friend are at the café behind the library.

sentences.chinese: 那棟大樓（的）前面有很多人。
sentences.pinyin: Nà dòng dàlóu (de) qiánmiàn yǒu hěn duō rén.
sentences.english: There are many people in front of that building.

sentences.chinese: 我家附近有圖書館。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jiā fùjìn yǒu túshūguǎn.
sentences.english: There is a library near my house.

sentences.chinese: 山上有兩家很有名的咖啡店。
sentences.pinyin: Shānshàng yǒu liǎng jiā hěn yǒumíng de kāfēidiàn.
sentences.english: There are two famous cafés in the mountains.

sentences.chinese: 樓下有一家商店。
sentences.pinyin: Lóuxià yǒu yì jiā shāngdiàn.
sentences.english: There is a store downstairs.

sentences.chinese: 他家附近沒有游泳池。
sentences.pinyin: Tā jiā fùjìn méiyǒu yóuyǒngchí.
sentences.english: There is no swimming pool near his house.

sentences.chinese: 教室裡面沒有學生。
sentences.pinyin: Jiàoshì lǐmiàn méiyǒu xuéshēng.
sentences.english: There are no students inside the classroom.

sentences.chinese: 那棟大樓的後面沒有餐廳。
sentences.pinyin: Nà dòng dàlóu de hòumiàn méiyǒu cāntīng.
sentences.english: There is no restaurant behind that building.

sentences.chinese: 你家附近有海嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jiā fùjìn yǒu hǎi ma?
sentences.english: Is there a sea near your house?

sentences.chinese: 學校（的）後面有沒有好吃的牛肉麵店？
sentences.pinyin: Xuéxiào (de) hòumiàn yǒu méiyǒu hǎochī de niúròumiàn diàn?
sentences.english: Is there a good beef noodle shop behind the school?

sentences.chinese: 他們學校很漂亮，我想去看(一)看。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen xuéxiào hěn piàoliàng, wǒ xiǎng qù kàn (yí) kàn.
sentences.english: Their school is very beautiful, I want to go take a look.

sentences.chinese: 我想學中文，請教教我。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xué Zhōngwén, qǐng jiāo jiāo wǒ.
sentences.english: I want to learn Chinese, please teach me.

sentences.chinese: 我們今天晚上去哪裡吃飯?我想（一）想。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen jīntiān wǎnshàng qù nǎlǐ chīfàn? Wǒ xiǎng (yì) xiǎng.
sentences.english: Where are we going to eat tonight? Let me think.

sentences.chinese:
你週末做什麼?在家看看書、喝喝咖啡、上上網，也
去學校打打籃球。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhōumò zuò shénme? Zài jiā kàn kàn shū, hē hē kāfēi, shàng shàng wǎng, yě qù xuéxiào dǎ dǎ lánqiú.
sentences.english: What do you do on weekends? Stay home to read a bit, drink some coffee, go online, and also go to school to play basketball.

sentences.chinese: 請幫幫我，好不好?
sentences.pinyin: Qǐng bāng bāng wǒ, hǎo bù hǎo?
sentences.english: Please help me, okay?

sentences.chinese: 請你教教我，可以嗎?
sentences.pinyin: Qǐng nǐ jiāo jiāo wǒ, kěyǐ ma?
sentences.english: Can you please teach me?

sentences.chinese: 現在外面很熱，你要不要在家看看書?
sentences.pinyin: Xiànzài wàimiàn hěn rè, nǐ yào bú yào zài jiā kàn kàn shū?
sentences.english: It's very hot outside now, do you want to stay home and read?

sentences.chinese: 我不會做甜點，你可不可以教教我?
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bú huì zuò tiándiǎn, nǐ kě bù kěyǐ jiāo jiāo wǒ?
sentences.english: I don’t know how to make desserts, can you teach me?

sentences.chinese: 明華覺得那支手機很貴。我覺得不是很貴。
sentences.pinyin: Mínghuá juéde nà zhī shǒujī hěn guì. Wǒ juéde bú shì hěn guì.
sentences.english: Minghua thinks that mobile phone is very expensive. I think it’s not very expensive.

sentences.chinese: 他不是點大碗的牛肉麵。他點小碗的。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bú shì diǎn dàwǎn de niúròumiàn. Tā diǎn xiǎowǎn de.
sentences.english: He didn’t order a big bowl of beef noodles. He ordered a small one.

sentences.chinese: 餐廳不是在學校裡面。餐廳在學校外面。
sentences.pinyin: Cāntīng bú shì zài xuéxiào lǐmiàn. Cāntīng zài xuéxiào wàimiàn.
sentences.english: The restaurant is not inside the school. The restaurant is outside the school.

sentences.chinese: 他們不是在樓下喝咖啡。他們在樓下買書。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen bú shì zài lóuxià hē kāfēi. Tāmen zài lóuxià mǎi shū.
sentences.english: They are not drinking coffee downstairs. They are buying books downstairs.

sentences.chinese: 我不是不來，我週末來。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bú shì bú lái, wǒ zhōumò lái.
sentences.english: It’s not that I’m not coming, I’m coming on the weekend.

sentences.chinese: 我不是不喜歡吃牛肉麵，可是這家的牛肉麵太辣了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bú shì bù xǐhuān chī niúròumiàn, kěshì zhè jiā de niúròumiàn tài là le.
sentences.english: It’s not that I don’t like eating beef noodles, but the beef noodles at this place are too spicy.

sentences.chinese: 我爸爸在家做飯。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bàba zài jiā zuò fàn.
sentences.english: My dad is cooking at home.

sentences.chinese: 他和他朋友到七樓的教室上網。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hé tā péngyǒu dào qī lóu de jiàoshì shàngwǎng.
sentences.english: He and his friend go to the classroom on the seventh floor to use the internet.

sentences.chinese: 我們老師常到學校附近的咖啡店喝咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen lǎoshī cháng dào xuéxiào fùjìn de kāfēidiàn hē kāfēi.
sentences.english: Our teacher often goes to the café near the school to drink coffee.

sentences.chinese: 我們很喜歡在這家餐廳吃牛肉麵。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen hěn xǐhuān zài zhè jiā cāntīng chī niúròumiàn.
sentences.english: We really like eating beef noodles at this restaurant.

sentences.chinese: 他們今天不在家吃晚飯。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen jīntiān bú zài jiā chī wǎnfàn.
sentences.english: They are not eating dinner at home today.

sentences.chinese: 他現在不在宿舍看書。
sentences.pinyin: Tā xiànzài bú zài sùshè kàn shū.
sentences.english: He is not reading in the dormitory now.

sentences.chinese: 很多學生不在學校裡面的咖啡店買咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn duō xuéshēng bú zài xuéxiào lǐmiàn de kāfēidiàn mǎi kāfēi.
sentences.english: Many students do not buy coffee at the café inside the school.

sentences.chinese: 你們在哪裡打籃球？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen zài nǎlǐ dǎ lánqiú?
sentences.english: Where do you play basketball?

sentences.chinese: 你妹妹到這家商店買甜點嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ mèimei dào zhè jiā shāngdiàn mǎi tiándiǎn ma?
sentences.english: Does your younger sister come to this store to buy desserts?

sentences.chinese: 他和他朋友下午在教室寫書法。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hé tā péngyǒu xiàwǔ zài jiàoshì xiě shūfǎ.
sentences.english: He and his friend are writing calligraphy in the classroom in the afternoon.

sentences.chinese: 我昨天晚上到我家附近的咖啡店喝咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān wǎnshàng dào wǒ jiā fùjìn de kāfēidiàn hē kāfēi.
sentences.english: I went to a café near my home last night to drink coffee.

sentences.chinese: 我們這個週末去圖書館看書。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen zhège zhōumò qù túshūguǎn kàn shū.
sentences.english: We are going to the library to read this weekend.

sentences.chinese: 你們明天早上十一點到我家來吃牛肉麵。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen míngtiān zǎoshàng shíyī diǎn dào wǒ jiā lái chī niúròumiàn.
sentences.english: Come to my house at 11 AM tomorrow to eat beef noodles.

sentences.chinese: 我晚上不在家吃飯。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ wǎnshàng bú zài jiā chīfàn.
sentences.english: I am not eating dinner at home tonight.

sentences.chinese: 他和他哥哥最近都不來學校上課。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hé tā gēge zuìjìn dōu bù lái xuéxiào shàngkè.
sentences.english: He and his older brother haven't been coming to school for classes recently.

sentences.chinese: 他們這個週末不去山上看風景。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen zhège zhōumò bú qù shānshàng kàn fēngjǐng.
sentences.english: They are not going to the mountains to see the scenery this weekend.

sentences.chinese: 你下午要不要來學校打籃球？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiàwǔ yào bú yào lái xuéxiào dǎ lánqiú?
sentences.english: Do you want to come to school to play basketball this afternoon?

sentences.chinese: 你們現在在我家附近的商店買手機嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen xiànzài zài wǒ jiā fùjìn de shāngdiàn mǎi shǒujī ma?
sentences.english: Are you buying a phone at a store near my house now?

sentences.chinese: 你朋友晚上幾點去KTV唱歌？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ péngyǒu wǎnshàng jǐ diǎn qù KTV chànggē?
sentences.english: What time is your friend going to KTV to sing tonight?

sentences.chinese: 他們什麼時候到花蓮看籃球比賽？
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen shénme shíhòu dào Huālián kàn lánqiú bǐsài?
sentences.english: When are they going to Hualien to watch the basketball game?

sentences.chinese: 你和你妹妹明天早上要去哪裡看電影？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hé nǐ mèimei míngtiān zǎoshàng yào qù nǎlǐ kàn diànyǐng?
sentences.english: Where are you and your younger sister going to watch a movie tomorrow morning?

sentences.chinese: 我從早上十點二十分到下午一點十分有中文課。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ cóng zǎoshàng shí diǎn èrshí fēn dào xiàwǔ yī diǎn shí fēn yǒu Zhōngwén kè.
sentences.english: I have Chinese class from 10:20 AM to 1:10 PM.

sentences.chinese: 我今天從早上到晚上都有空，歡迎你們來我家。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jīntiān cóng zǎoshàng dào wǎnshàng dōu yǒu kòng, huānyíng nǐmen lái wǒ jiā.
sentences.english: I am free all day today. You’re welcome to come to my house.

sentences.chinese: 從我家到那個游泳池有一點遠。
sentences.pinyin: Cóng wǒ jiā dào nàge yóuyǒngchí yǒu yìdiǎn yuǎn.
sentences.english: It’s a bit far from my house to that swimming pool.

sentences.chinese: 我從我朋友家到這個地方來。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ cóng wǒ péngyǒu jiā dào zhège dìfāng lái.
sentences.english: I came here from my friend’s house.

sentences.chinese: 他從圖書館到那家餐廳去吃飯。
sentences.pinyin: Tā cóng túshūguǎn dào nà jiā cāntīng qù chīfàn.
sentences.english: He is going from the library to that restaurant to eat.

sentences.chinese: 我們的書法課不是從九點到十一點。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen de shūfǎ kè bú shì cóng jiǔ diǎn dào shíyī diǎn.
sentences.english: Our calligraphy class is not from 9 AM to 11 AM.

sentences.chinese: 陳先生的媽媽昨天不是從早上到晚上都很忙。
sentences.pinyin: Chén xiānshēng de māma zuótiān bú shì cóng zǎoshàng dào wǎnshàng dōu hěn máng.
sentences.english: Mr. Chen’s mom was not busy all day yesterday.

sentences.chinese: 我什麼時候可以去你家？我今天從早上到晚上都沒有空。可是明天可以。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ shénme shíhòu kěyǐ qù nǐ jiā? Wǒ jīntiān cóng zǎoshàng dào wǎnshàng dōu méiyǒu kòng, kěshì míngtiān kěyǐ.
sentences.english: When can I go to your house? I’m not free at all today, but I can tomorrow.

sentences.chinese: 從這棟大樓到那家KTV不遠。
sentences.pinyin: Cóng zhè dòng dàlóu dào nà jiā KTV bù yuǎn.
sentences.english: It’s not far from this building to that KTV.

sentences.chinese: 我不想從學校到那裡去，想從我家去。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bù xiǎng cóng xuéxiào dào nàlǐ qù, xiǎng cóng wǒ jiā qù.
sentences.english: I don’t want to go there from school; I want to go from my house.

sentences.chinese: 你們老師後天從早上到下午都有空嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen lǎoshī hòutiān cóng zǎoshàng dào xiàwǔ dōu yǒu kòng ma?
sentences.english: Will your teacher be free all day the day after tomorrow?

sentences.chinese: 請問從圖書館到你們宿舍遠不遠？
sentences.pinyin: Qǐngwèn cóng túshūguǎn dào nǐmen sùshè yuǎn bù yuǎn?
sentences.english: Excuse me, is it far from the library to your dormitory?

sentences.chinese: 他們想從宿舍還是圖書館到教室去上課？
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen xiǎng cóng sùshè háishì túshūguǎn dào jiàoshì qù shàngkè?
sentences.english: Do they want to go to class from the dormitory or the library?

sentences.chinese: 李老師在上課 。
sentences.pinyin: Lǐ lǎoshī zài shàngkè.
sentences.english: Teacher Li is teaching a class.

sentences.chinese: 你看! 陳先生在唱歌 。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kàn! Chén xiānshēng zài chànggē.
sentences.english: Look! Mr. Chen is singing.

sentences.chinese: 昨天下午五點我在做飯 。
sentences.pinyin: Zuótiān xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn wǒ zài zuòfàn.
sentences.english: I was cooking at 5 PM yesterday.

sentences.chinese: 他不是在看 書 . 他在看籃球比賽 。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bú shì zài kàn shū. Tā zài kàn lánqiú bǐsài.
sentences.english: He is not reading a book. He is watching a basketball game.

sentences.chinese: 我不是在 照相 。我的手機不能照相 。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bú shì zài zhàoxiàng. Wǒ de shǒujī bù néng zhàoxiàng.
sentences.english: I am not taking a photo. My phone cannot take photos.

sentences.chinese: 你們在喝 什麼 ?
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen zài hē shénme?
sentences.english: What are you drinking?

sentences.chinese: 他們老師在上課嗎 ?
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen lǎoshī zài shàngkè ma?
sentences.english: Is their teacher teaching a class?

sentences.chinese: 他們在打籃球嗎 ?
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen zài dǎ lánqiú ma?
sentences.english: Are they playing basketball?

sentences.chinese: 他妹妹每天都 有 空 。
sentences.pinyin: Tā mèimei měitiān dōu yǒu kòng.
sentences.english: His younger sister is free every day.

sentences.chinese: 他朋 友每個 週末都 去 學校附近的 游泳池潜泳 。
sentences.pinyin: Tā péngyǒu měi ge zhōumò dōu qù xuéxiào fùjìn de yóuyǒngchí qiányǒng.
sentences.english: His friend goes diving at the swimming pool near the school every weekend.

sentences.chinese: 每一棟大樓都 可 以 上綱 。
sentences.pinyin: Měi yī dòng dàlóu dōu kěyǐ shàngwǎng.
sentences.english: Every building has internet access.

sentences.chinese: 他 家人 , 每個 人都 會做舜點 。
sentences.pinyin: Tā jiārén, měi ge rén dōu huì zuò tiándiǎn.
sentences.english: Everyone in his family can make desserts.

sentences.chinese: 他每天都 不 忙 。
sentences.pinyin: Tā měitiān dōu bù máng.
sentences.english: He is not busy every day.

sentences.chinese: 我媽媽每個 週末都沒空 。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ māma měi ge zhōumò dōu méi kòng.
sentences.english: My mom is not free on weekends.

sentences.chinese: 這 家甯 店 , 每支手機都 不 便 宜 。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiā shāngdiàn, měi zhī shǒujī dōu bù piányí.
sentences.english: In this store, every phone is expensive.

sentences.chinese: 他朋 友不 是每天都 去看 電 影 。
sentences.pinyin: Tā péngyǒu bú shì měitiān dōu qù kàn diànyǐng.
sentences.english: His friend does not watch movies every day.

sentences.chinese: 我 們 不 是每天都 有 書 法課 。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen bú shì měitiān dōu yǒu shūfǎ kè.
sentences.english: We don’t have calligraphy class every day.

sentences.chinese: 他 的 兄弟姐妹不 是每個 人都 喜歡打球 。
sentences.pinyin: Tā de xiōngdì jiěmèi bú shì měi ge rén dōu xǐhuān dǎqiú.
sentences.english: Not all of his siblings like playing ball.

sentences.chinese: 他每個 週末都 去哪裡運動 ?
sentences.pinyin: Tā měi ge zhōumò dōu qù nǎlǐ yùndòng?
sentences.english: Where does he go to exercise every weekend?

sentences.chinese: 你 爸爸每天都在 家吃 晚飯嗎 ?
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ bàba měitiān dōu zài jiā chī wǎnfàn ma?
sentences.english: Does your dad eat dinner at home every day?

sentences.chinese: 他的照片, 每 張都很好看 嗎 ?
sentences.pinyin: Tā de zhàopiàn, měi zhāng dōu hěn hǎokàn ma?
sentences.english: Are all of his photos good-looking?

sentences.chinese: 我媽媽說，你們可以來我家打籃球。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ māma shuō, nǐmen kěyǐ lái wǒ jiā dǎ lánqiú.
sentences.english: My mom said you can come to my house to play basketball.

sentences.chinese: 爸爸說，我可以買這支手機。
sentences.pinyin: Bàba shuō, wǒ kěyǐ mǎi zhè zhī shǒujī.
sentences.english: Dad said I can buy this phone.

sentences.chinese: 我叫馬安同，你可以叫我小馬。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jiào Mǎ Āntóng, nǐ kěyǐ jiào wǒ Xiǎo Mǎ.
sentences.english: My name is Ma Antong, you can call me Xiao Ma.

sentences.chinese: 媽媽說，我不可以賣這支手機。
sentences.pinyin: Māma shuō, wǒ bù kěyǐ mài zhè zhī shǒujī.
sentences.english: Mom said I can't sell this phone.

sentences.chinese: 你不可以在圖書館裡面吃東西。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ bù kěyǐ zài túshūguǎn lǐmiàn chī dōngxi.
sentences.english: You can't eat inside the library.

sentences.chinese: 先生，對不起，你不可以在這裡照相。
sentences.pinyin: Xiānshēng, duìbùqǐ, nǐ bù kěyǐ zài zhèlǐ zhàoxiàng.
sentences.english: Sir, sorry, you can't take photos here.

sentences.chinese: 我可以不可以去看你們的籃球比賽？沒問題！
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ kěyǐ bù kěyǐ qù kàn nǐmen de lánqiú bǐsài? Méi wèntí!
sentences.english: Can I go watch your basketball game? No problem!

sentences.chinese: 我想吃你的包子，可以嗎？可以啊。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng chī nǐ de bāozi, kěyǐ ma? Kěyǐ a.
sentences.english: I want to eat your steamed bun, is that okay? Sure!

sentences.chinese: 這是你的書嗎？我可以看看嗎？對不起，那不是我的書。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè shì nǐ de shū ma? Wǒ kěyǐ kànkan ma? Duìbùqǐ, nà bú shì wǒ de shū.
sentences.english: Is this your book? Can I take a look? Sorry, that's not my book.

sentences.chinese: 你可不可以明天來？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kě bù kěyǐ míngtiān lái?
sentences.english: Can you come tomorrow?

sentences.chinese: 我可以不可以買一支新手機？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ kěyǐ bù kěyǐ mǎi yī zhī xīn shǒujī?
sentences.english: Can I buy a new phone?

sentences.chinese: 媽媽，我可不可以買這支手機？可以。
sentences.pinyin: Māma, wǒ kě bù kěyǐ mǎi zhè zhī shǒujī? Kěyǐ.
sentences.english: Mom, can I buy this phone? Yes.

sentences.chinese: 我常跟哥哥去看棒球比賽。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ cháng gēn gēge qù kàn bàngqiú bǐsài.
sentences.english: I often go to watch baseball games with my older brother.

sentences.chinese: 我跟朋友在餐廳吃飯。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gēn péngyǒu zài cāntīng chīfàn.
sentences.english: I am eating with my friends at the restaurant.

sentences.chinese: 我週末要跟同學去參觀故宮。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zhōumò yào gēn tóngxué qù cānguān Gùgōng.
sentences.english: I am going to visit the National Palace Museum with my classmates this weekend.

sentences.chinese: 我今天不跟同學去上書法課。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jīntiān bù gēn tóngxué qù shàng shūfǎ kè.
sentences.english: I am not going to calligraphy class with my classmates today.

sentences.chinese: 他不跟我一起去KTV唱歌。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù gēn wǒ yìqǐ qù KTV chànggē.
sentences.english: He is not going to KTV to sing with me.

sentences.chinese: 妹妹不跟我去吃越南菜。
sentences.pinyin: Mèimei bù gēn wǒ qù chī Yuènán cài.
sentences.english: My younger sister is not going to eat Vietnamese food with me.

sentences.chinese: 你要跟他去日本嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yào gēn tā qù Rìběn ma?
sentences.english: Are you going to Japan with him?

sentences.chinese: 你常跟誰去看電影？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ cháng gēn shéi qù kàn diànyǐng?
sentences.english: Who do you often go to watch movies with?

sentences.chinese: 你想跟我去打網球嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng gēn wǒ qù dǎ wǎngqiú ma?
sentences.english: Do you want to play tennis with me?

sentences.chinese: 你跟不跟我去圖書館看書？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ gēn bù gēn wǒ qù túshūguǎn kàn shū?
sentences.english: Are you going to the library to read with me?

sentences.chinese: 你們怎麼去？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen zěnme qù?
sentences.english: How are you going?

sentences.chinese: 這個菜怎麼做？
sentences.pinyin: Zhège cài zěnme zuò?
sentences.english: How do you make this dish?

sentences.chinese: 這個歌怎麼唱？
sentences.pinyin: Zhège gē zěnme chàng?
sentences.english: How do you sing this song?

sentences.chinese: 這支新手機怎麼上網？
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhī xīn shǒujī zěnme shàngwǎng?
sentences.english: How do you go online with this new phone?

sentences.chinese: 今天比較熱。
sentences.pinyin: Jīntiān bǐjiào rè.
sentences.english: It's hotter today.

sentences.chinese: 越南餐廳很遠。坐捷運比較快。
sentences.pinyin: Yuènán cāntīng hěn yuǎn. Zuò jiéyùn bǐjiào kuài.
sentences.english: The Vietnamese restaurant is far. Taking the MRT is faster.

sentences.chinese: 我們家，姐姐比較會做飯。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen jiā, jiějie bǐjiào huì zuò fàn.
sentences.english: In our family, my older sister is better at cooking.

sentences.chinese: 昨天比較不熱。
sentences.pinyin: Zuótiān bǐjiào bú rè.
sentences.english: Yesterday was not as hot.

sentences.chinese: 他比較不喜歡游泳。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bǐjiào bù xǐhuān yóuyǒng.
sentences.english: He doesn’t like swimming as much.

sentences.chinese: 我最近比較沒有空。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn bǐjiào méiyǒu kòng.
sentences.english: I have been relatively busier recently.

sentences.chinese: 咖啡和茶，你比較喜歡喝咖啡嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Kāfēi hé chá, nǐ bǐjiào xǐhuān hē kāfēi ma?
sentences.english: Between coffee and tea, do you prefer coffee?

sentences.chinese: 你和哥哥，你比較會打棒球嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hé gēge, nǐ bǐjiào huì dǎ bàngqiú ma?
sentences.english: Between you and your older brother, are you better at playing baseball?

sentences.chinese: 他比較想去看美國電影還是日本電影？
sentences.pinyin: Tā bǐjiào xiǎng qù kàn Měiguó diànyǐng háishì Rìběn diànyǐng?
sentences.english: Does he prefer to watch American movies or Japanese movies?

sentences.chinese: 這家餐廳的菜，又便宜又好吃，所以我們常來吃。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de cài, yòu piányí yòu hǎochī, suǒyǐ wǒmen cháng lái chī.
sentences.english: The food at this restaurant is cheap and delicious, so we often come here to eat.

sentences.chinese: 坐高鐵又快又舒服，可是有一點貴。
sentences.pinyin: Zuò gāotiě yòu kuài yòu shūfú, kěshì yǒu yìdiǎn guì.
sentences.english: Taking the high-speed rail is both fast and comfortable, but it's a bit expensive.

sentences.chinese: 我又想喝茶又想喝咖啡，但是這裡沒有便利商店。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yòu xiǎng hē chá yòu xiǎng hē kāfēi, dànshì zhèlǐ méiyǒu biànlì shāngdiàn.
sentences.english: I want to drink both tea and coffee, but there is no convenience store here.

sentences.chinese: 老闆今天做的臭豆腐，又不臭又不辣。我 覺得不好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Lǎobǎn jīntiān zuò de chòudòufu, yòu bú chòu yòu bú là. Wǒ juéde bù hǎochī.
sentences.english: The stinky tofu the owner made today is neither smelly nor spicy. I think it doesn’t taste good.

sentences.chinese: 我的舊手機又不能照相又不能上網。我想買新的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de jiù shǒujī yòu bù néng zhàoxiàng yòu bù néng shàngwǎng. Wǒ xiǎng mǎi xīn de.
sentences.english: My old phone can neither take photos nor go online. I want to buy a new one.

sentences.chinese: 山上的風景比這裡漂亮。
sentences.pinyin: Shānshàng de fēngjǐng bǐ zhèlǐ piàoliàng.
sentences.english: The scenery in the mountains is more beautiful than here.

sentences.chinese: 我們學校比他們學校遠。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen xuéxiào bǐ tāmen xuéxiào yuǎn.
sentences.english: Our school is farther than their school.

sentences.chinese: 坐捷運比坐火車快。
sentences.pinyin: Zuò jiéyùn bǐ zuò huǒchē kuài.
sentences.english: Taking the MRT is faster than taking the train.

sentences.chinese: 在家上網不比在學校快。
sentences.pinyin: Zài jiā shàngwǎng bù bǐ zài xuéxiào kuài.
sentences.english: Using the internet at home is not faster than at school.

sentences.chinese: 我的車不比他的車貴。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de chē bù bǐ tā de chē guì.
sentences.english: My car is not more expensive than his.

sentences.chinese: 坐公車不是比坐計程車快。
sentences.pinyin: Zuò gōngchē bú shì bǐ zuò jìchéngchē kuài.
sentences.english: Taking the bus is not faster than taking a taxi.

sentences.chinese: 他們學校比你們學校遠嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen xuéxiào bǐ nǐmen xuéxiào yuǎn ma?
sentences.english: Is their school farther than your school?

sentences.chinese: 這種手機比那種貴嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng shǒujī bǐ nà zhǒng guì ma?
sentences.english: Is this type of phone more expensive than that one?

sentences.chinese: 我去花蓮玩一個星期。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qù Huālián wán yī ge xīngqí.
sentences.english: I'm going to Hualien for a week.

sentences.chinese: 這個電影很有意思，可是要看三個鐘頭。
sentences.pinyin: Zhège diànyǐng hěn yǒuyìsi, kěshì yào kàn sān ge zhōngtóu.
sentences.english: This movie is interesting, but it takes three hours to watch.

sentences.chinese: 中文，我想學一年半。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōngwén, wǒ xiǎng xué yī nián bàn.
sentences.english: I want to study Chinese for a year and a half.

sentences.chinese: 我去日本旅行一個多星期。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qù Rìběn lǚxíng yī ge duō xīngqí.
sentences.english: I'm traveling to Japan for a little over a week.

sentences.chinese: 這麼多甜點，我們要吃一個星期。
sentences.pinyin: Zhème duō tiándiǎn, wǒmen yào chī yī ge xīngqí.
sentences.english: With so many desserts, we'll need a week to finish them.

sentences.chinese: 我想坐高鐵去臺南玩兩天。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng zuò gāotiě qù Táinán wán liǎng tiān.
sentences.english: I want to take the high-speed rail to Tainan for two days.

sentences.chinese: 中文課，我們學校要上四年。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōngwén kè, wǒmen xuéxiào yào shàng sì nián.
sentences.english: Our school has four years of Chinese classes.

sentences.chinese: 他打算教中文教一年。
sentences.pinyin: Tā dǎsuàn jiāo Zhōngwén jiāo yī nián.
sentences.english: He plans to teach Chinese for a year.

sentences.chinese: 我每個星期學書法學兩天。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ měi ge xīngqí xué shūfǎ xué liǎng tiān.
sentences.english: I practice calligraphy two days a week.

sentences.chinese: 今年我想在臺灣學中文學九個月。
sentences.pinyin: Jīnnián wǒ xiǎng zài Táiwān xué Zhōngwén xué jiǔ ge yuè.
sentences.english: This year, I want to study Chinese in Taiwan for nine months.

sentences.chinese: 他太忙了，所以他兩天不能來上課。
sentences.pinyin: Tā tài máng le, suǒyǐ tā liǎng tiān bù néng lái shàngkè.
sentences.english: He's too busy, so he can't come to class for two days.

sentences.chinese: 這裡沒有網路，所以我兩個星期不能上網。
sentences.pinyin: Zhèlǐ méiyǒu wǎnglù, suǒyǐ wǒ liǎng ge xīngqí bù néng shàngwǎng.
sentences.english: There's no internet here, so I can't go online for two weeks.

sentences.chinese: 她要回美國，所以一個月不能上課。
sentences.pinyin: Tā yào huí Měiguó, suǒyǐ yī ge yuè bù néng shàngkè.
sentences.english: She has to return to the U.S., so she can't attend classes for a month.

sentences.chinese: 我每星期上五天的課。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ měi xīngqí shàng wǔ tiān de kè.
sentences.english: I have classes five days a week.

sentences.chinese: 學校下個月放三天的假。
sentences.pinyin: Xuéxiào xià ge yuè fàng sān tiān de jià.
sentences.english: The school has a three-day holiday next month.

sentences.chinese: 我們打算明天去KTV唱三個鐘頭的歌。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen dǎsuàn míngtiān qù KTV chàng sān ge zhōngtóu de gē.
sentences.english: We plan to sing at KTV for three hours tomorrow.

sentences.chinese: 你決定在臺灣學多久的中文？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juédìng zài Táiwān xué duōjiǔ de Zhōngwén?
sentences.english: How long have you decided to study Chinese in Taiwan?

sentences.chinese: 在山上看風景的時候，我覺得很舒服。
sentences.pinyin: Zài shānshàng kàn fēngjǐng de shíhòu, wǒ juéde hěn shūfú.
sentences.english: When I look at the scenery in the mountains, I feel very comfortable.

sentences.chinese: 放假的時候，我喜歡去逛夜市。
sentences.pinyin: Fàngjià de shíhòu, wǒ xǐhuān qù guàng yèshì.
sentences.english: During holidays, I like to go to the night market.

sentences.chinese: 你有空的時候，請到我家來玩。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu kòng de shíhòu, qǐng dào wǒ jiā lái wán.
sentences.english: When you have time, please come to my house.

sentences.chinese: 我有時候吃中國菜，有時候吃越南菜。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yǒushíhòu chī Zhōngguó cài, yǒushíhòu chī Yuènán cài.
sentences.english: Sometimes I eat Chinese food, sometimes I eat Vietnamese food.

sentences.chinese: 在圖書館的時候，我有時候看書，有時候上網
sentences.pinyin: Zài túshūguǎn de shíhòu, wǒ yǒushíhòu kàn shū, yǒushíhòu shàngwǎng.
sentences.english: When I'm at the library, sometimes I read books, sometimes I go online.

sentences.chinese: 放假的時候，我有時候在家寫功課，有時候出去玩。
sentences.pinyin: Fàngjià de shíhòu, wǒ yǒushíhòu zài jiā xiě gōngkè, yǒushíhòu chūqù wán.
sentences.english: During holidays, sometimes I do homework at home, sometimes I go out to play.

sentences.chinese: 要是我有錢，我就買大房子。
sentences.pinyin: Yàoshì wǒ yǒu qián, wǒ jiù mǎi dà fángzi.
sentences.english: If I have money, I'll buy a big house.

sentences.chinese: 我要是不回國，我就跟你們一起去玩。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yàoshì bù huí guó, wǒ jiù gēn nǐmen yīqǐ qù wán.
sentences.english: If I don't go back to my country, I'll go out with you guys.

sentences.chinese: 要是我有空，我就跟朋友一起去KTV唱歌。
sentences.pinyin: Yàoshì wǒ yǒu kòng, wǒ jiù gēn péngyǒu yīqǐ qù KTV chànggē.
sentences.english: If I have time, I'll go to KTV with my friends.

sentences.chinese: 你要是星期日有空，你就跟我去旅行吧!
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yàoshì xīngqírì yǒu kòng, nǐ jiù gēn wǒ qù lǚxíng ba!
sentences.english: If you're free on Sunday, come travel with me!

sentences.chinese: 要是下個月不忙，她就回國。
sentences.pinyin: Yàoshì xià ge yuè bù máng, tā jiù huí guó.
sentences.english: If she's not busy next month, she'll go back to her country.

sentences.chinese: 你要是沒空，我們就不要去逛夜市。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yàoshì méi kòng, wǒmen jiù bù yào qù guàng yèshì.
sentences.english: If you're not free, we won't go to the night market.

sentences.chinese: 這杯咖啡很香，你喝喝看。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè bēi kāfēi hěn xiāng, nǐ hē hē kàn.
sentences.english: This cup of coffee smells great. Try drinking it.

sentences.chinese: 聽說你唱歌唱得很好，我想聽聽看。
sentences.pinyin: Tīngshuō nǐ chànggē chàng de hěn hǎo, wǒ xiǎng tīng tīng kàn.
sentences.english: I heard you sing well. I want to listen.

sentences.chinese: 那家餐廳的菜很好吃，我想去吃吃看。
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiā cāntīng de cài hěn hǎo chī, wǒ xiǎng qù chī chī kàn.
sentences.english: The food at that restaurant is delicious. I want to try it.

sentences.chinese: 臺灣的夜市很有名，這個週末我想去逛逛看。
sentences.pinyin: Táiwān de yèshì hěn yǒumíng, zhège zhōumò wǒ xiǎng qù guàng guàng kàn.
sentences.english: Taiwan's night markets are famous. I want to check one out this weekend.

sentences.chinese: 這碗牛肉湯香香的。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè wǎn niúròu tāng xiāng xiāng de.
sentences.english: This bowl of beef soup smells great.

sentences.chinese: 熱熱的咖啡，真香。
sentences.pinyin: Rè rè de kāfēi, zhēn xiāng.
sentences.english: Hot coffee smells so good.

sentences.chinese: 那個地方有很多高高的大樓。
sentences.pinyin: Nà ge dìfāng yǒu hěn duō gāo gāo de dàlóu.
sentences.english: There are many tall buildings in that place.

sentences.chinese: 你說的水果是西瓜。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de shuǐguǒ shì xīguā.
sentences.english: The fruit you mentioned is watermelon.

sentences.chinese: 他喝的茶是烏龍茶。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hē de chá shì wūlóng chá.
sentences.english: The tea he drinks is oolong tea.

sentences.chinese: 這些是我拍的照片。
sentences.pinyin: Zhèxiē shì wǒ pāi de zhàopiàn.
sentences.english: These are the photos I took.

sentences.chinese: 穿黃衣服的這個人是老闆。
sentences.pinyin: Chuān huáng yīfú de zhège rén shì lǎobǎn.
sentences.english: The person wearing yellow clothes is the boss.

sentences.chinese: 現在去那裡玩的人比較少。
sentences.pinyin: Xiànzài qù nàlǐ wán de rén bǐjiào shǎo.
sentences.english: Fewer people are going there to play now.

sentences.chinese: 買這種手機的人很多。
sentences.pinyin: Mǎi zhè zhǒng shǒujī de rén hěn duō.
sentences.english: Many people buy this type of phone.

sentences.chinese: 不能上網的手機很不方便。
sentences.pinyin: Bù néng shàngwǎng de shǒujī hěn bù fāngbiàn.
sentences.english: A phone that can't go online is very inconvenient.

sentences.chinese: 不去逛夜市的人可以去茶館喝茶。
sentences.pinyin: Bù qù guàng yèshì de rén kěyǐ qù cháguǎn hē chá.
sentences.english: People who don’t go to the night market can go to a teahouse for tea.

sentences.chinese: 不來上課的同學不能去看籃球比賽。
sentences.pinyin: Bù lái shàngkè de tóngxué bù néng qù kàn lánqiú bǐsài.
sentences.english: Students who don’t attend class can't watch the basketball game.

sentences.chinese: 咖啡貴了。
sentences.pinyin: Kāfēi guì le.
sentences.english: Coffee has become expensive.

sentences.chinese: 我會打網球了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ huì dǎ wǎngqiú le.
sentences.english: I can play tennis now.

sentences.chinese: 現在有手機的人多了。
sentences.pinyin: Xiànzài yǒu shǒujī de rén duō le.
sentences.english: More people have mobile phones now.

sentences.chinese: 我現在喜歡吃越南麵了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiànzài xǐhuān chī Yuènán miàn le.
sentences.english: I like eating Vietnamese noodles now.

sentences.chinese: 我媽媽不喝咖啡了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ māma bù hē kāfēi le.
sentences.english: My mom doesn't drink coffee anymore.

sentences.chinese: 他不想買那支手機了。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù xiǎng mǎi nà zhī shǒujī le.
sentences.english: He doesn’t want to buy that phone anymore.

sentences.chinese: 我們不要去參觀故宮了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen bù yào qù cānguān Gùgōng le.
sentences.english: We don't want to visit the National Palace Museum anymore.

sentences.chinese: 你想吃午餐了嗎?
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng chī wǔcān le ma?
sentences.english: Do you want to eat lunch now?

sentences.chinese: 現在學中文的學生多了嗎?
sentences.pinyin: Xiànzài xué Zhōngwén de xuéshēng duō le ma?
sentences.english: Are there more students learning Chinese now?

sentences.chinese: 你們不去臺東了嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen bù qù Táidōng le ma?
sentences.english: Aren't you going to Taitung anymore?

sentences.chinese:
因為現在去玩的人比較少，所以旅館不太
貴。
sentences.pinyin: Yīnwèi xiànzài qù wán de rén bǐjiào shǎo, suǒyǐ lǚguǎn bù tài guì.
sentences.english: Since fewer people are traveling now, hotels aren’t too expensive.

sentences.chinese: 因為火車太慢了，所以我想坐高鐵。
sentences.pinyin: Yīnwèi huǒchē tài màn le, suǒyǐ wǒ xiǎng zuò gāotiě.
sentences.english: Because the train is too slow, I want to take the high-speed rail.

sentences.chinese: 因為我不會做飯，所以常去餐廳吃飯。
sentences.pinyin: Yīnwèi wǒ bù huì zuòfàn, suǒyǐ cháng qù cāntīng chīfàn.
sentences.english: Since I can't cook, I often go to restaurants.

sentences.chinese:
因為我不知道在哪裡買票，所以想請你幫
我買。
sentences.pinyin: Yīnwèi wǒ bù zhīdào zài nǎlǐ mǎi piào, suǒyǐ xiǎng qǐng nǐ bāng wǒ mǎi.
sentences.english: Since I don’t know where to buy tickets, I’d like to ask you to help me buy them.

sentences.chinese: 我來學中文。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ lái xué Zhōngwén.
sentences.english: I come to learn Chinese.

sentences.chinese: 他來打籃球。
sentences.pinyin: Tā lái dǎ lánqiú.
sentences.english: He comes to play basketball.

sentences.chinese: 我和朋友來逛夜市。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ hé péngyǒu lái guàng yèshì.
sentences.english: My friend and I come to visit the night market.

sentences.chinese: 我明天有事不來上課。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ míngtiān yǒu shì bù lái shàngkè.
sentences.english: I have something to do tomorrow, so I won’t come to class.

sentences.chinese: 她不跟我來看電影。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù gēn wǒ lái kàn diànyǐng.
sentences.english: She won’t come to watch a movie with me.

sentences.chinese: 我很忙，不來幫你裝有線電視了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ hěn máng, bù lái bāng nǐ zhuāng yǒuxiàn diànshì le.
sentences.english: I’m very busy, so I won’t come to help you install cable TV.

sentences.chinese: 他不來吃晚飯嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù lái chī wǎnfàn ma?
sentences.english: Isn’t he coming to eat dinner?

sentences.chinese: 你們常來游泳嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen cháng lái yóuyǒng ma?
sentences.english: Do you often come to swim?

sentences.chinese: 你要來參觀故宮博物院嗎?
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yào lái cānguān Gùgōng Bówùyuàn ma?
sentences.english: Do you want to visit the National Palace Museum?

sentences.chinese: 我星期四來/去上書法課。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xīngqīsì lái/qù shàng shūfǎ kè.
sentences.english: I come/go to calligraphy class on Thursday.

sentences.chinese: 我妹妹不想來/去吃牛肉麵。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ mèimei bù xiǎng lái/qù chī niúròu miàn.
sentences.english: My younger sister doesn’t want to come/go eat beef noodles.

sentences.chinese: 學校很近。走路十分鐘就到了。
sentences.pinyin: Xuéxiào hěn jìn. Zǒulù shí fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
sentences.english: The school is very close. It only takes ten minutes on foot.

sentences.chinese: 那個地方不遠。很快就到了。
sentences.pinyin: Nàge dìfāng bù yuǎn. Hěn kuài jiù dào le.
sentences.english: That place isn’t far. It won’t take long to get there.

sentences.chinese: 他等一下就來。
sentences.pinyin: Tā děng yíxià jiù lái.
sentences.english: He will come in a moment.

sentences.chinese: 有人住這裡。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu rén zhù zhèlǐ.
sentences.english: Someone lives here.

sentences.chinese: 有兩個學生來找你。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu liǎng ge xuéshēng lái zhǎo nǐ.
sentences.english: Two students came looking for you.

sentences.chinese: 早上有一個小姐打電話給你。
sentences.pinyin: Zǎoshàng yǒu yí ge xiǎojiě dǎ diànhuà gěi nǐ.
sentences.english: A young lady called you this morning.

sentences.chinese: 昨天有一個先生來裝有線電視。
sentences.pinyin: Zuótiān yǒu yí ge xiānshēng lái zhuāng yǒuxiàn diànshì.
sentences.english: Yesterday, a gentleman came to install cable TV.

sentences.chinese: 有一個人在外面唱歌。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yí ge rén zài wàimiàn chànggē.
sentences.english: Someone is outside singing.

sentences.chinese: 這件沒有人住。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiān méiyǒu rén zhù.
sentences.english: No one lives in this room.

sentences.chinese: 沒有人要跟我去逛夜市。
sentences.pinyin: Méiyǒu rén yào gēn wǒ qù guàng yèshì.
sentences.english: No one wants to go to the night market with me.

sentences.chinese: 沒有學生要去故宮。
sentences.pinyin: Méiyǒu xuéshēng yào qù Gùgōng.
sentences.english: No students want to go to the National Palace Museum.

sentences.chinese: 有人在裡面看書嗎?
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu rén zài lǐmiàn kànshū ma?
sentences.english: Is someone inside reading?

sentences.chinese: 有沒有人想去KTV唱歌?
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu méiyǒu rén xiǎng qù KTV chànggē?
sentences.english: Does anyone want to go to KTV to sing?

sentences.chinese: 有沒有人要跟我一起去花蓮玩?
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu méiyǒu rén yào gēn wǒ yìqǐ qù Huālián wán?
sentences.english: Does anyone want to go to Hualien with me?

sentences.chinese: 有沒有人不喜歡吃日本麵？
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu méiyǒu rén bù xǐhuān chī Rìběn miàn?
sentences.english: Is there anyone who doesn’t like eating Japanese noodles?

sentences.chinese: 地上有一支手機。是誰的？
sentences.pinyin: Dìshàng yǒu yì zhī shǒujī. Shì shéi de?
sentences.english: There’s a cellphone on the ground. Whose is it?

sentences.chinese: 有一支手機在地上。地上？為什麼在地上？
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì zhī shǒujī zài dìshàng. Dìshàng? Wèishéme zài dìshàng?
sentences.english: There’s a cellphone on the ground. On the ground? Why is it on the ground?

sentences.chinese: 他會做飯。
sentences.pinyin: Tā huì zuòfàn.
sentences.english: He can cook.

sentences.chinese: 我不會打籃球。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bù huì dǎ lánqiú.
sentences.english: I can’t play basketball.

sentences.chinese: 我明天回去看看她。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ míngtiān huíqù kànkan tā.
sentences.english: I’ll go back to see her tomorrow.

sentences.chinese: 他明天不會去上書法課。
sentences.pinyin: Tā míngtiān bù huì qù shàng shūfǎ kè.
sentences.english: He won’t go to calligraphy class tomorrow.

sentences.chinese: 弟弟打算先去旅行再找工作。
sentences.pinyin: Dìdì dǎsuàn xiān qù lǚxíng zài zhǎo gōngzuò.
sentences.english: My younger brother plans to travel first before looking for a job.

sentences.chinese: 我想先吃晚飯再給媽媽打電話。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xiān chī wǎnfàn zài gěi māmā dǎ diànhuà.
sentences.english: I want to eat dinner first, then call my mom.

sentences.chinese: 他計畫在臺灣先學語言再念大學。
sentences.pinyin: Tā jìhuà zài Táiwān xiān xué yǔyán zài niàn dàxué.
sentences.english: He plans to learn the language first in Taiwan before going to university.

sentences.chinese: 我昨天晚上先寫功課，再看電視。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān wǎnshàng xiān xiě gōngkè, zài kàn diànshì.
sentences.english: I did my homework first last night, then watched TV.

sentences.chinese: 我明天先去圖書館看書，再去超市買東西。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ míngtiān xiān qù túshūguǎn kànshū, zài qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxī.
sentences.english: I will go to the library to read first tomorrow, then go to the supermarket to buy things.

sentences.chinese: 他是昨天晚上到臺灣的。
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì zuótiān wǎnshàng dào Táiwān de.
sentences.english: He arrived in Taiwan last night.

sentences.chinese: 他是在學校附近吃晚飯的。
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì zài xuéxiào fùjìn chī wǎnfàn de.
sentences.english: He had dinner near the school.

sentences.chinese: 我是坐捷運來學校的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ shì zuò jiéyùn lái xuéxiào de.
sentences.english: I came to school by MRT.

sentences.chinese: 學費是公司替我付的。
sentences.pinyin: Xuéfèi shì gōngsī tì wǒ fù de.
sentences.english: My tuition was paid by the company.

sentences.chinese: 這支手機是在夜市買的。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhī shǒujī shì zài yèshì mǎi de.
sentences.english: This phone was bought at the night market.

sentences.chinese: 是我打電話給房東的。
sentences.pinyin: Shì wǒ dǎ diànhuà gěi fángdōng de.
sentences.english: I was the one who called the landlord.

sentences.chinese: 我是昨天晚上去看電影的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ shì zuótiān wǎnshàng qù kàn diànyǐng de.
sentences.english: I went to see a movie last night.

sentences.chinese: 他是在那家便利商店買咖啡的。
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì zài nà jiā biànlì shāngdiàn mǎi kāfēi de.
sentences.english: He bought coffee at that convenience store.

sentences.chinese: 我是坐公車來上課的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ shì zuò gōngchē lái shàngkè de.
sentences.english: I came to class by bus.

sentences.chinese: 他不是今天早上去美國的。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù shì jīntiān zǎoshàng qù Měiguó de.
sentences.english: He didn’t go to the U.S. this morning.

sentences.chinese: 不是我打電話給房東的。
sentences.pinyin: Bù shì wǒ dǎ diànhuà gěi fángdōng de.
sentences.english: I wasn’t the one who called the landlord.

sentences.chinese: 我不是在圖書館看書的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bù shì zài túshūguǎn kànshū de.
sentences.english: I wasn’t reading at the library.

sentences.chinese: 你是一個人來的嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì yí ge rén lái de ma?
sentences.english: Did you come alone?

sentences.chinese: 他是坐高鐵去臺南的嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì zuò gāotiě qù Táinán de ma?
sentences.english: Did he take the high-speed rail to Tainan?

sentences.chinese: 你的房租是自己付的嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ de fángzū shì zìjǐ fù de ma?
sentences.english: Did you pay the rent yourself?

sentences.chinese: 我(是)跟朋友一起來的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ (shì) gēn péngyǒu yìqǐ lái de.
sentences.english: I came with my friend.

sentences.chinese: 我(是)坐計程車來的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ (shì) zuò jìchéngchē lái de.
sentences.english: I came by taxi.

sentences.chinese: 是誰打電話給你的？
sentences.pinyin: Shì shéi dǎ diànhuà gěi nǐ de?
sentences.english: Who called you?

sentences.chinese: 他是什麼時候來學校的？
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì shénme shíhòu lái xuéxiào de?
sentences.english: When did he come to school?

sentences.chinese: 你是怎麼去的？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì zěnme qù de?
sentences.english: How did you go?

sentences.chinese: 你是在哪裡吃飯的？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì zài nǎlǐ chīfàn de?
sentences.english: Where did you eat?

sentences.chinese: 我們以後都得上班。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen yǐhòu dōu děi shàngbān.
sentences.english: We all have to work in the future.

sentences.chinese: 他們以後還要再到台南去。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen yǐhòu hái yào zài dào Táinán qù.
sentences.english: They will go to Tainan again in the future.

sentences.chinese: 回國以後，我要找個有機會說中文的工作。
sentences.pinyin: Huíguó yǐhòu, wǒ yào zhǎo ge yǒu jīhuì shuō Zhōngwén de gōngzuò.
sentences.english: After returning to my country, I want to find a job where I can speak Chinese.

sentences.chinese: 來臺灣以後，我每星期上五天的中文課。
sentences.pinyin: Lái Táiwān yǐhòu, wǒ měi xīngqī shàng wǔ tiān de Zhōngwén kè.
sentences.english: Since coming to Taiwan, I have five Chinese classes per week.

sentences.chinese: 我下課以後，常在圖書館上網。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiàkè yǐhòu, cháng zài túshūguǎn shàngwǎng.
sentences.english: After class, I often use the internet at the library.

sentences.chinese: 日本菜好吃也好看。
sentences.pinyin: Rìběn cài hǎochī yě hǎokàn.
sentences.english: Japanese food is tasty and looks good.

sentences.chinese: 好工作很難找。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo gōngzuò hěn nán zhǎo.
sentences.english: A good job is hard to find.

sentences.chinese: 這個歌好聽也好唱。
sentences.pinyin: Zhège gē hǎotīng yě hǎochàng.
sentences.english: This song sounds good and is easy to sing.

sentences.chinese: 我媽媽做的菜很好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ māmā zuò de cài hěn hǎochī.
sentences.english: My mom’s cooking is delicious.

sentences.chinese: 有人覺得中文很難學。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu rén juéde Zhōngwén hěn nán xué.
sentences.english: Some people think Chinese is hard to learn.

sentences.chinese: 便宜的咖啡不好喝。
sentences.pinyin: Piányí de kāfēi bù hǎohē.
sentences.english: Cheap coffee doesn’t taste good.

sentences.chinese: 學校餐廳的菜不難吃。
sentences.pinyin: Xuéxiào cāntīng de cài bù nán chī.
sentences.english: The school cafeteria’s food is not bad.

sentences.chinese: 這個歌，唱得太慢不好聽。
sentences.pinyin: Zhège gē, chàng de tài màn bù hǎotīng.
sentences.english: This song sounds bad when sung too slowly.

sentences.chinese: 這家店賣的小籠包不好做。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn mài de xiǎolóngbāo bù hǎozuò.
sentences.english: The soup dumplings sold at this shop are hard to make.

sentences.chinese: 老師常常說中文不難學。
sentences.pinyin: Lǎoshī chángcháng shuō Zhōngwén bù nán xué.
sentences.english: The teacher often says Chinese isn’t hard to learn.

sentences.chinese: 學校附近便宜的套房不好找。
sentences.pinyin: Xuéxiào fùjìn piányí de tàofáng bù hǎo zhǎo.
sentences.english: Cheap studio apartments near the school are hard to find.

sentences.chinese: 旅館老闆買的水果好吃嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Lǚguǎn lǎobǎn mǎi de shuǐguǒ hǎochī ma?
sentences.english: Are the fruits bought by the hotel owner tasty?

sentences.chinese: 你覺得那個電影好看不好看?
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juéde nàge diànyǐng hǎokàn bù hǎokàn?
sentences.english: Do you think that movie was good or not?

sentences.chinese: 點烏龍茶的那個先生唱歌唱得好聽嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Diǎn wūlóngchá de nàge xiānshēng chànggē chàng de hǎotīng ma?
sentences.english: Does the gentleman who ordered oolong tea sing well?

sentences.chinese: 說中文的工作在你的國家好找嗎?
sentences.pinyin: Shuō Zhōngwén de gōngzuò zài nǐ de guójiā hǎo zhǎo ma?
sentences.english: Are jobs requiring Chinese language skills easy to find in your country?

sentences.chinese: 又大又貴的房子好不好賣？
sentences.pinyin: Yòu dà yòu guì de fángzi hǎo bù hǎo mài?
sentences.english: Are large and expensive houses easy to sell?

sentences.chinese: 老師今天教的甜點難不難學？
sentences.pinyin: Lǎoshī jīntiān jiāo de tiándiǎn nán bù nán xué?
sentences.english: Is the dessert the teacher taught today difficult to learn?

sentences.chinese: 我一下課，就回來。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yí xiàkè, jiù huílái.
sentences.english: As soon as I finish class, I’ll come back.

sentences.chinese: 他一回國，就找工作。
sentences.pinyin: Tā yí huíguó, jiù zhǎo gōngzuò.
sentences.english: As soon as he returns to his country, he’ll look for a job.

sentences.chinese: 我妹妹一回去，就給媽媽打電話。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ mèimei yí huíqù, jiù gěi māma dǎ diànhuà.
sentences.english: As soon as my younger sister goes back, she’ll call Mom.

sentences.chinese: 我一下課，就去吃晚飯。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yí xiàkè, jiù qù chī wǎnfàn.
sentences.english: As soon as I finish class, I’ll go eat dinner.

sentences.chinese: 他打算等那裡一沒人，就去拍照。
sentences.pinyin: Tā dǎsuàn děng nàlǐ yí méirén, jiù qù pāizhào.
sentences.english: He plans to take pictures as soon as no one is there.

sentences.chinese: 老闆今天早上一到公司，就不開心。
sentences.pinyin: Lǎobǎn jīntiān zǎoshàng yí dào gōngsī, jiù bù kāixīn.
sentences.english: The boss was unhappy as soon as he arrived at the office this morning.

sentences.chinese: 他一下課，就去學校找你嗎?
sentences.pinyin: Tā yí xiàkè, jiù qù xuéxiào zhǎo nǐ ma?
sentences.english: Does he go to school to find you as soon as class ends?

sentences.chinese:
我們今天是不是比賽一結束，就一起去
KTV唱歌?
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen jīntiān shì bùshì bǐsài yí jiéshù, jiù yìqǐ qù KTV chànggē?
sentences.english: Are we going to KTV together as soon as the game ends today?

sentences.chinese: 我剛在便利商店喝了咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gāng zài biànlì shāngdiàn hē le kāfēi.
sentences.english: I just drank coffee at the convenience store.

sentences.chinese: 我昨天吃了很多東西。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān chī le hěn duō dōngxī.
sentences.english: I ate a lot of food yesterday.

sentences.chinese: 今天早上我喝了一杯咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Jīntiān zǎoshàng wǒ hē le yì bēi kāfēi.
sentences.english: I drank a cup of coffee this morning.

sentences.chinese: 他租了一個漂亮的房子。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zū le yí ge piàoliàng de fángzi.
sentences.english: He rented a beautiful apartment.

sentences.chinese: 我今天沒吃午餐。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jīntiān méi chī wǔcān.
sentences.english: I didn’t eat lunch today.

sentences.chinese: 我最近很忙，一星期都沒看電視。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn hěn máng, yì xīngqī dōu méi kàn diànshì.
sentences.english: I’ve been very busy recently and haven’t watched TV all week.

sentences.chinese: 昨天跟朋友去過生日，所以我沒寫功課。
sentences.pinyin: Zuótiān gēn péngyǒu qù guò shēngrì, suǒyǐ wǒ méi xiě gōngkè.
sentences.english: I celebrated a birthday with friends yesterday, so I didn’t do my homework.

sentences.chinese: 弟弟吃了午餐沒有?
sentences.pinyin: Dìdi chī le wǔcān méiyǒu?
sentences.english: Has my younger brother eaten lunch?

sentences.chinese: 下個月的學費，他付了沒有?
sentences.pinyin: Xià ge yuè de xuéfèi, tā fù le méiyǒu?
sentences.english: Has he paid next month’s tuition?

sentences.chinese: 今晚的籃球比賽開始了沒有？
sentences.pinyin: Jīnwǎn de lánqiú bǐsài kāishǐ le méiyǒu?
sentences.english: Has tonight’s basketball game started?

sentences.chinese: 我沒吃晚飯。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ méi chī wǎnfàn.
sentences.english: I didn’t eat dinner.

sentences.chinese: 我們星期六不上課。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen xīngqīliù bù shàngkè.
sentences.english: We don’t have class on Saturdays.

sentences.chinese: 學生常不吃早餐。
sentences.pinyin: Xuéshēng cháng bù chī zǎocān.
sentences.english: Students often don’t eat breakfast.

sentences.chinese: 我不去圖書館。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bù qù túshūguǎn.
sentences.english: I’m not going to the library.

sentences.chinese: 他不找工作。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù zhǎo gōngzuò.
sentences.english: He’s not looking for a job.

sentences.chinese: 昨天我沒打電話給他。
sentences.pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ méi dǎ diànhuà gěi tā.
sentences.english: I didn’t call him yesterday.

sentences.chinese: 上個星期我沒跟同學去KTV。
sentences.pinyin: Shàng ge xīngqī wǒ méi gēn tóngxué qù KTV.
sentences.english: I didn’t go to KTV with classmates last week.

sentences.chinese: 今天我沒坐捷運來上課。我坐公車。
sentences.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ méi zuò jiéyùn lái shàngkè. Wǒ zuò gōngchē.
sentences.english: I didn’t take the MRT to class today. I took the bus.

sentences.chinese: 今天不熱，我想出去逛逛。
sentences.pinyin: Jīntiān bù rè, wǒ xiǎng chūqù guàngguàng.
sentences.english: It’s not hot today, so I want to go out for a walk.

sentences.chinese: 他說中文不難學，可是中國字不好寫。
sentences.pinyin: Tā shuō Zhōngwén bù nán xué, kěshì Zhōngguó zì bù hǎo xiě.
sentences.english: He says learning Chinese isn’t hard, but Chinese characters are difficult to write.

sentences.chinese: 我不舒服，今天不想出去。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bù shūfú, jīntiān bù xiǎng chūqù.
sentences.english: I’m not feeling well and don’t want to go out today.

sentences.chinese: 中文課還沒結束，所以我不能回國。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōngwén kè hái méi jiéshù, suǒyǐ wǒ bù néng huíguó.
sentences.english: My Chinese class hasn’t ended yet, so I can’t return to my country.

sentences.chinese: 我沒忘。你先去學校，我等一下去找你。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ méi wàng. Nǐ xiān qù xuéxiào, wǒ děng yíxià qù zhǎo nǐ.
sentences.english: I didn’t forget. You go to school first, and I’ll find you later.

sentences.chinese: 我還沒決定要不要去旅行？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ hái méi juédìng yào bú yào qù lǚxíng?
sentences.english: I haven’t decided yet whether I want to travel or not.

sentences.chinese: 誰都喜歡去旅行。
sentences.pinyin: Shéi dōu xǐhuān qù lǚxíng.
sentences.english: Everyone likes to travel.

sentences.chinese: 哪裡都有好吃的東西。
sentences.pinyin: Nǎlǐ dōu yǒu hǎochī de dōngxī.
sentences.english: There’s delicious food everywhere.

sentences.chinese: 他什麼都想買。
sentences.pinyin: Tā shénme dōu xiǎng mǎi.
sentences.english: He wants to buy everything.

sentences.chinese: 弟弟什麼時候都在上網。
sentences.pinyin: Dìdi shénme shíhòu dōu zài shàngwǎng.
sentences.english: My younger brother is always online.

sentences.chinese: 他們學校很方便，怎麼去都能到。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen xuéxiào hěn fāngbiàn, zěnme qù dōu néng dào.
sentences.english: Their school is very convenient; you can get there any way.

sentences.chinese: 誰也不喜歡難看的東西。
sentences.pinyin: Shéi yě bù xǐhuān nánkàn de dōngxī.
sentences.english: No one likes ugly things.

sentences.chinese: 昨天我哪裡都沒去，在家看電視。
sentences.pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ nǎlǐ dōu méi qù, zài jiā kàn diànshì.
sentences.english: I didn’t go anywhere yesterday, just stayed home watching TV.

sentences.chinese: 我今天什麼也不想吃。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jīntiān shénme yě bù xiǎng chī.
sentences.english: I don’t want to eat anything today.

sentences.chinese:
下個星期，我什麼時候都不在家，我要去
旅行。
sentences.pinyin: Xià ge xīngqī, wǒ shénme shíhòu dōu bú zài jiā, wǒ yào qù lǚxíng.
sentences.english: Next week, I won’t be home at any time because I’m going traveling.

sentences.chinese: 中國菜很難做，我怎麼做都不好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōngguó cài hěn nán zuò, wǒ zěnme zuò dōu bù hǎochī.
sentences.english: Chinese food is hard to cook; no matter how I make it, it doesn’t taste good.

sentences.chinese: 這家餐廳的東西什麼都好吃嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de dōngxī shénme dōu hǎochī ma?
sentences.english: Is everything in this restaurant delicious?

sentences.chinese: 你今天什麼時候都在公司嗎?
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān shénme shíhòu dōu zài gōngsī ma?
sentences.english: Are you at the company all day today?

sentences.chinese: 我最近沒錢了，應該少買東西。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn méi qián le, yīnggāi shǎo mǎi dōngxī.
sentences.english: I don’t have much money lately, so I should buy fewer things.

sentences.chinese: 我中文不好，應該多看書，少看電視。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ Zhōngwén bù hǎo, yīnggāi duō kàn shū, shǎo kàn diànshì.
sentences.english: My Chinese isn’t good, so I should read more books and watch less TV.

sentences.chinese: 我們明天應該多穿衣服嗎?
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen míngtiān yīnggāi duō chuān yīfú ma?
sentences.english: Should we wear more clothes tomorrow?

sentences.chinese: 他喜歡臺灣，想多學一點中文。
sentences.pinyin: Tā xǐhuān Táiwān, xiǎng duō xué yìdiǎn Zhōngwén.
sentences.english: He likes Taiwan and wants to learn more Chinese.

sentences.chinese: 昨天我朋友來我家，我多做了一點菜。
sentences.pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ péngyǒu lái wǒ jiā, wǒ duō zuò le yìdiǎn cài.
