sentences.english: My friend came to my house yesterday, so I made a little more food.

sentences.chinese: 她今天太累了，想少做一點功課。
sentences.pinyin: Tā jīntiān tài lèi le, xiǎng shǎo zuò yìdiǎn gōngkè.
sentences.english: She’s too tired today and wants to do a little less homework.

sentences.chinese: 你是不是在家等我？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì bú shì zài jiā děng wǒ?
sentences.english: Are you waiting for me at home?

sentences.chinese: 那家餐廳是不是很有名？
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiā cāntīng shì bú shì hěn yǒumíng?
sentences.english: Is that restaurant very famous?

sentences.chinese: 你是不是剛旅行回來？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì bú shì gāng lǚxíng huílái?
sentences.english: Did you just come back from traveling?

sentences.chinese: 你銀行有錢嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yínháng yǒu qián ma?
sentences.english: Do you have money in your bank?

sentences.chinese: 你銀行有沒有錢？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yínháng yǒu méiyǒu qián?
sentences.english: Do you have money in your bank?

sentences.chinese: 你銀行是不是有錢？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yínháng shì bú shì yǒu qián?
sentences.english: Do you have money in your bank?

sentences.chinese: 這支手機跟那支手機一樣。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhī shǒujī gēn nà zhī shǒujī yíyàng.
sentences.english: This phone is the same as that phone.

sentences.chinese:
我的生日跟她的生日一樣，都是八月十七
日。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de shēngrì gēn tā de shēngrì yíyàng, dōu shì bā yuè shíqī rì.
sentences.english: My birthday is the same as hers; both are on August 17th.

sentences.chinese: 他跟我一樣，都常游泳。
sentences.pinyin: Tā gēn wǒ yíyàng, dōu cháng yóuyǒng.
sentences.english: He is the same as me; we both swim often.

sentences.chinese: 你點的菜跟我點的一樣。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ diǎn de cài gēn wǒ diǎn de yíyàng.
sentences.english: The dish you ordered is the same as the one I ordered.

sentences.chinese: 我跟我妹妹一樣高。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gēn wǒ mèimei yíyàng gāo.
sentences.english: My younger sister and I are the same height.

sentences.chinese: 姐姐租的房子跟我租的一樣貴。
sentences.pinyin: Jiějie zū de fángzi gēn wǒ zū de yíyàng guì.
sentences.english: The apartment my older sister rented is as expensive as mine.

sentences.chinese: 我跟我朋友一樣喜歡看電視。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gēn wǒ péngyǒu yíyàng xǐhuān kàn diànshì.
sentences.english: My friend and I both like watching TV.

sentences.chinese: 中國茶跟日本茶不一樣。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōngguó chá gēn Rìběn chá bù yíyàng.
sentences.english: Chinese tea and Japanese tea are not the same.

sentences.chinese: 我跟妹妹不一樣高。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gēn mèimei bù yíyàng gāo.
sentences.english: My younger sister and I are not the same height.

sentences.chinese: 他不跟我一樣高，跟小王一樣高。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù gēn wǒ yíyàng gāo, gēn Xiǎo Wáng yíyàng gāo.
sentences.english: He is not as tall as me; he’s as tall as Xiao Wang.

sentences.chinese: 小籠包跟包子一樣不一樣?
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎolóngbāo gēn bāozi yíyàng bù yíyàng?
sentences.english: Are soup dumplings and buns the same or different?

sentences.chinese: 小籠包跟包子是不是一樣？
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎolóngbāo gēn bāozi shì bú shì yíyàng?
sentences.english: Are soup dumplings the same as buns?

sentences.chinese: 今年的生意是不是跟去年的一樣好？
sentences.pinyin: Jīnnián de shēngyì shì bú shì gēn qùnián de yíyàng hǎo?
sentences.english: Is business this year as good as last year?

sentences.chinese: 說中文跟寫中文是不是一樣難？
sentences.pinyin: Shuō Zhōngwén gēn xiě Zhōngwén shì bú shì yíyàng nán?
sentences.english: Is speaking Chinese as difficult as writing it?

sentences.chinese: 媽媽的朋友在臺北玩了三天。
sentences.pinyin: Māmā de péngyǒu zài Táiběi wán le sān tiān.
sentences.english: Mom’s friend stayed in Taipei for three days.

sentences.chinese: 老師在美國住了一年。
sentences.pinyin: Lǎoshī zài Měiguó zhù le yì nián.
sentences.english: The teacher lived in the U.S. for a year.

sentences.chinese: 李小姐在語言中心工作了一個月。
sentences.pinyin: Lǐ xiǎojiě zài yǔyán zhōngxīn gōngzuò le yí ge yuè.
sentences.english: Miss Li worked at the language center for a month.

sentences.chinese: 他租房子租了半年。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zū fángzi zū le bàn nián.
sentences.english: He rented an apartment for six months.

sentences.chinese: 他住臺北住了三年。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zhù Táiběi zhù le sān nián.
sentences.english: He lived in Taipei for three years.

sentences.chinese: 房子他只租了半年。
sentences.pinyin: Fángzi tā zhǐ zū le bàn nián.
sentences.english: He only rented the apartment for six months.

sentences.chinese: 臺北他只住了三年。
sentences.pinyin: Táiběi tā zhǐ zhù le sān nián.
sentences.english: He only lived in Taipei for three years.

sentences.chinese: 那間房子你租了一年半嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiān fángzi nǐ zū le yì nián bàn ma?
sentences.english: Did you rent that apartment for a year and a half?

sentences.chinese: 你是不是在這裡等了一個鐘頭？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì bú shì zài zhèlǐ děng le yí ge zhōngtóu?
sentences.english: Have you been waiting here for an hour?

sentences.chinese: 陳老闆去年是不是在紐約住了半年？
sentences.pinyin: Chén lǎobǎn qùnián shì bú shì zài Niǔyuē zhù le bàn nián?
sentences.english: Did Boss Chen live in New York for six months last year?

sentences.chinese: 她已經在臺灣玩了一年了。
sentences.pinyin: Tā yǐjīng zài Táiwān wán le yì nián le.
sentences.english: She has already been traveling in Taiwan for a year.

sentences.chinese: 陳小姐在美國住了五年了。
sentences.pinyin: Chén xiǎojiě zài Měiguó zhù le wǔ nián le.
sentences.english: Miss Chen has been living in the U.S. for five years.

sentences.chinese: 我工作了兩個月了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gōngzuò le liǎng ge yuè le.
sentences.english: I have been working for two months.

sentences.chinese: 這間房子，他已經租了半年了。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiān fángzi, tā yǐjīng zū le bàn nián le.
sentences.english: He has already rented this apartment for six months.

sentences.chinese: 他們學中文學了三個星期了。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen xué Zhōngwén xué le sān ge xīngqí le.
sentences.english: They have been studying Chinese for three weeks.

sentences.chinese: 快下雨了。
sentences.pinyin: Kuài xiàyǔ le.
sentences.english: It's about to rain.

sentences.chinese: 電影要結束了。
sentences.pinyin: Diànyǐng yào jiéshù le.
sentences.english: The movie is about to end.

sentences.chinese: 爸爸快要到家了。
sentences.pinyin: Bàba kuàiyào dào jiā le.
sentences.english: Dad is about to arrive home.

sentences.chinese: 你媽媽的生日快到了嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ māma de shēngrì kuài dào le ma?
sentences.english: Is your mom’s birthday coming up soon?

sentences.chinese: 比賽要開始了嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Bǐsài yào kāishǐ le ma?
sentences.english: Is the competition about to start?

sentences.chinese: 哥哥的女朋友快要回法國了嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Gēge de nǚ péngyǒu kuàiyào huí Fǎguó le ma?
sentences.english: Is my brother’s girlfriend about to return to France?

sentences.chinese: 他很高，他哥哥比他更高。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hěn gāo, tā gēge bǐ tā gèng gāo.
sentences.english: He is tall, but his older brother is even taller.

sentences.chinese: 今年比去年更冷。
sentences.pinyin: Jīnnián bǐ qùnián gèng lěng.
sentences.english: This year is colder than last year.

sentences.chinese: 我覺得芒果比西瓜更好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ juédé mángguǒ bǐ xīguā gèng hǎochī.
sentences.english: I think mangoes taste better than watermelons.

sentences.chinese: 這次的颱風是不是比上次的更大？
sentences.pinyin: Zhè cì de táifēng shì bú shì bǐ shàngcì de gèng dà?
sentences.english: Is this typhoon bigger than the last one?

sentences.chinese: 在學校上網是不是比在家裡更快？
sentences.pinyin: Zài xuéxiào shàngwǎng shì bú shì bǐ zài jiālǐ gèng kuài?
sentences.english: Is using the internet at school faster than at home?

sentences.chinese: 哥哥沒有爸爸那麼高。
sentences.pinyin: Gēge méiyǒu bàba nàme gāo.
sentences.english: My older brother is not as tall as my dad.

sentences.chinese: 火車沒有高鐵那麼快。
sentences.pinyin: Huǒchē méiyǒu gāotiě nàme kuài.
sentences.english: The train is not as fast as the high-speed rail.

sentences.chinese: 我的中文沒有老師的那麼好。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de Zhōngwén méiyǒu lǎoshī de nàme hǎo.
sentences.english: My Chinese is not as good as my teacher’s.

sentences.chinese: 臭豆腐沒有牛肉麵這麼好吃。
sentences.pinyin: Chòu dòufu méiyǒu niúròumiàn zhème hǎochī.
sentences.english: Stinky tofu is not as tasty as beef noodle soup.

sentences.chinese: 甜點沒有小籠包那麼好做。
sentences.pinyin: Tiándiǎn méiyǒu xiǎolóngbāo nàme hǎo zuò.
sentences.english: Desserts are not as easy to make as soup dumplings.

sentences.chinese: 這次的颱風沒有上次的那麼可怕。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè cì de táifēng méiyǒu shàngcì de nàme kěpà.
sentences.english: This typhoon is not as scary as the last one.

sentences.chinese: 妹妹有沒有姊姊那麼漂亮？
sentences.pinyin: Mèimei yǒu méiyǒu jiějie nàme piàoliàng?
sentences.english: Is my younger sister as pretty as my older sister?

sentences.chinese: 花蓮的房租有沒有臺北的那麼貴？
sentences.pinyin: Huālián de fángzū yǒu méiyǒu Táiběi de nàme guì?
sentences.english: Is rent in Hualien as expensive as in Taipei?

sentences.chinese: 日本的工作有沒有美國的那麼難找？
sentences.pinyin: Rìběn de gōngzuò yǒu méiyǒu Měiguó de nàme nán zhǎo?
sentences.english: Is it as hard to find a job in Japan as in the U.S.?

sentences.chinese: 夏天的天氣有沒有春天的舒服？
sentences.pinyin: Xiàtiān de tiānqì yǒu méiyǒu chūntiān de shūfú?
sentences.english: Is summer weather as comfortable as spring weather?

sentences.chinese: 今天跟昨天一樣熱。
sentences.pinyin: Jīntiān gēn zuótiān yíyàng rè.
sentences.english: Today is as hot as yesterday.

sentences.chinese: 今天沒有昨天那麼熱。
sentences.pinyin: Jīntiān méiyǒu zuótiān nàme rè.
sentences.english: Today is not as hot as yesterday.

sentences.chinese: 今天比昨天熱。
sentences.pinyin: Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān rè.
sentences.english: Today is hotter than yesterday.

sentences.chinese: 我沒有多少錢。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ méiyǒu duōshǎo qián.
sentences.english: I don’t have much money.

sentences.chinese: 她沒有幾個朋友。
sentences.pinyin: Tā méiyǒu jǐ ge péngyǒu.
sentences.english: She doesn’t have many friends.

sentences.chinese: 你的感冒沒有什麼關係。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ de gǎnmào méiyǒu shénme guānxì.
sentences.english: Your cold is not a big deal.

sentences.chinese: 我沒去哪裡。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ méi qù nǎlǐ.
sentences.english: I didn’t go anywhere.

sentences.chinese: 他不打算買什麼。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bù dǎsuàn mǎi shénme.
sentences.english: He doesn’t plan to buy anything.

sentences.chinese: 我昨天沒跟誰去看電影。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān méi gēn shéi qù kàn diànyǐng.
sentences.english: I didn’t go to the movies with anyone yesterday.

sentences.chinese: 我把牛肉麵吃了
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ niúròumiàn chī le.
sentences.english: I ate the beef noodle soup.

sentences.chinese: 他把我的湯喝了。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bǎ wǒ de tāng hē le.
sentences.english: He drank my soup.

sentences.chinese: 房東把房子賣了。
sentences.pinyin: Fángdōng bǎ fángzi mài le.
sentences.english: The landlord sold the house.

sentences.chinese: 我沒把豬腳麵線吃了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ méi bǎ zhūjiǎo miànxiàn chī le.
sentences.english: I didn’t eat the pork trotter noodles.

sentences.chinese: 別把我的藥吃了。
sentences.pinyin: Bié bǎ wǒ de yào chī le.
sentences.english: Don’t take my medicine.

sentences.chinese: 他沒把書賣了。
sentences.pinyin: Tā méi bǎ shū mài le.
sentences.english: He didn’t sell the book.

sentences.chinese: 你把功課寫了沒有？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ bǎ gōngkè xiě le méiyǒu?
sentences.english: Have you finished your homework?

sentences.chinese: 你是不是把機車賣了？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì bú shì bǎ jīchē mài le?
sentences.english: Did you sell the scooter?

sentences.chinese: 你是不是把他的早飯吃了？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì bú shì bǎ tā de zǎofàn chī le?
sentences.english: Did you eat his breakfast?

sentences.chinese: 我想把手機賣了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng bǎ shǒujī mài le.
sentences.english: I want to sell my phone.

sentences.chinese: 我想把那支手機賣了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng bǎ nà zhī shǒujī mài le.
sentences.english: I want to sell that phone.

sentences.chinese: 我放了假就去旅行。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ fàng le jià jiù qù lǚxíng.
sentences.english: As soon as I have a break, I’ll travel.

sentences.chinese: 他吃了藥就睡覺。
sentences.pinyin: Tā chī le yào jiù shuìjiào.
sentences.english: He took medicine and immediately went to sleep.

sentences.chinese: 爸爸回了家就喝了兩杯烏龍茶。
sentences.pinyin: Bàba huí le jiā jiù hē le liǎng bēi wūlóngchá.
sentences.english: Dad came home and drank two cups of oolong tea.

sentences.chinese: 他到了臺北，就去臺北101看看。
sentences.pinyin: Tā dào le Táiběi, jiù qù Táiběi 101 kànkan.
sentences.english: As soon as he arrived in Taipei, he went to see Taipei 101.

sentences.chinese: 妹妹喝了一碗熱湯，就不覺得冷了。
sentences.pinyin: Mèimei hē le yì wǎn rè tāng, jiù bù juédé lěng le.
sentences.english: My younger sister drank a bowl of hot soup and didn’t feel cold anymore.

sentences.chinese: 姐姐吃了臭豆腐，肚子就不舒服。
sentences.pinyin: Jiějie chī le chòu dòufu, dùzi jiù bù shūfú.
sentences.english: My older sister ate stinky tofu and her stomach felt uncomfortable.

sentences.chinese: 他們見了面，就去喝咖啡嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen jiàn le miàn, jiù qù hē kāfēi ma?
sentences.english: Did they go for coffee as soon as they met?

sentences.chinese: 你弟弟是不是下了課，就去KTV唱歌?
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ dìdi shì bú shì xià le kè, jiù qù KTV chànggē?
sentences.english: Did your younger brother go to KTV to sing right after class?

sentences.chinese:
他是不是去紐約玩了兩個星期，就不想回
來了？
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì bú shì qù Niǔyuē wán le liǎng ge xīngqí, jiù bù xiǎng huílái le?
sentences.english: Did he go to New York for two weeks and then not want to come back?

sentences.chinese: 她吃了藥以後，就去睡覺。
sentences.pinyin: Tā chī le yào yǐhòu, jiù qù shuìjiào.
sentences.english: After taking medicine, she went to sleep.

sentences.chinese: 他喝了一點咖啡。
sentences.pinyin: Tā hē le yì diǎn kāfēi.
sentences.english: He drank a little coffee.

sentences.chinese: 這一點錢太少了。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè yì diǎn qián tài shǎo le.
sentences.english: This amount of money is too little.

sentences.chinese: 她要吃一點麵線。
sentences.pinyin: Tā yào chī yì diǎn miànxiàn.
sentences.english: She wants to eat a little noodles.

sentences.chinese: 她在超市買了一點東西。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zài chāoshì mǎi le yì diǎn dōngxi.
sentences.english: She bought a few things at the supermarket.

sentences.chinese: 我只喝了一點烏龍茶。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zhǐ hē le yì diǎn wūlóngchá.
sentences.english: I only drank a little oolong tea.

sentences.chinese: 昨天下了一點雨。
sentences.pinyin: Zuótiān xià le yì diǎn yǔ.
sentences.english: It rained a little yesterday.

sentences.chinese: 他比我年輕一點。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bǐ wǒ niánqīng yì diǎn.
sentences.english: He is a little younger than me.

sentences.chinese: 請你早一點來!
sentences.pinyin: Qǐng nǐ zǎo yì diǎn lái!
sentences.english: Please come a little earlier!

sentences.chinese: 明天我會晚一點回家。
sentences.pinyin: Míngtiān wǒ huì wǎn yì diǎn huí jiā.
sentences.english: Tomorrow, I will go home a little later.

sentences.chinese: 牛肉麵有一點辣。
sentences.pinyin: Niúròumiàn yǒu yì diǎn là.
sentences.english: The beef noodle soup is a little spicy.

sentences.chinese: 這裡，冬天有一點冷。
sentences.pinyin: Zhèlǐ, dōngtiān yǒu yì diǎn lěng.
sentences.english: It’s a bit cold here in winter.

sentences.chinese: 這支手機有一點貴。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhī shǒujī yǒu yì diǎn guì.
sentences.english: This phone is a little expensive.

sentences.chinese: 他有（一）點想睡。
sentences.pinyin: Tā yǒu (yì) diǎn xiǎng shuì.
sentences.english: He is a little sleepy.

sentences.chinese: 哥哥吃牛肉麵吃得比弟弟多。
sentences.pinyin: Gēge chī niúròumiàn chī de bǐ dìdi duō.
sentences.english: My older brother ate more beef noodles than my younger brother.

sentences.chinese: 這種手機賣得比那種好。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng shǒujī mài de bǐ nà zhǒng hǎo.
sentences.english: This type of phone sells better than that one.

sentences.chinese: 他比我做得快。
sentences.pinyin: Tā bǐ wǒ zuò de kuài.
sentences.english: He works faster than me.

sentences.chinese: 我比他走得快。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bǐ tā zǒu de kuài.
sentences.english: I walk faster than him.

sentences.chinese: 弟弟比哥哥念得好。
sentences.pinyin: Dìdi bǐ gēge niàn de hǎo.
sentences.english: My younger brother studies better than my older brother.

sentences.chinese: 他做飯做得比我快。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zuò fàn zuò de bǐ wǒ kuài.
sentences.english: He cooks faster than me.

sentences.chinese: 我走路走得比他快。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zǒulù zǒu de bǐ tā kuài.
sentences.english: I walk faster than him.

sentences.chinese: 弟弟念書念得比哥哥好。
sentences.pinyin: Dìdi niànshū niàn de bǐ gēge hǎo.
sentences.english: My younger brother studies better than my older brother.

sentences.chinese: 他做飯不比我做得快。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zuò fàn bù bǐ wǒ zuò de kuài.
sentences.english: He doesn’t cook faster than me.

sentences.chinese: 走路，我不比他走得快。
sentences.pinyin: Zǒulù, wǒ bù bǐ tā zǒu de kuài.
sentences.english: When walking, I’m not faster than him.

sentences.chinese: 弟弟念書念得不比哥哥好。
sentences.pinyin: Dìdi niànshū niàn de bù bǐ gēge hǎo.
sentences.english: My younger brother doesn’t study better than my older brother.

sentences.chinese: 你做飯做得比媽媽好嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuò fàn zuò de bǐ māma hǎo ma?
sentences.english: Do you cook better than your mom?

sentences.chinese: 他是不是走路走得比你快？
sentences.pinyin: Tā shì bú shì zǒulù zǒu de bǐ nǐ kuài?
sentences.english: Does he walk faster than you?

sentences.chinese: 弟弟打網球打得比哥哥好嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Dìdi dǎ wǎngqiú dǎ de bǐ gēge hǎo ma?
sentences.english: Does my younger brother play tennis better than my older brother?

sentences.chinese: 他的房間比我的大一點。
sentences.pinyin: Tā de fángjiān bǐ wǒ de dà yì diǎn.
sentences.english: His room is a little bigger than mine.

sentences.chinese: 捷運站比公車站遠得多。
sentences.pinyin: Jiéyùnzhàn bǐ gōngchēzhàn yuǎn de duō.
sentences.english: The MRT station is much farther than the bus stop.

sentences.chinese: 我覺得晚上比早上舒服多了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ juédé wǎnshàng bǐ zǎoshàng shūfú duō le.
sentences.english: I feel that nighttime is much more comfortable than morning.

sentences.chinese: 哥哥是不是比弟弟高一點？
sentences.pinyin: Gēge shì bú shì bǐ dìdi gāo yì diǎn?
sentences.english: Is my older brother a little taller than my younger brother?

sentences.chinese: 房租可以便宜一點嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Fángzū kěyǐ piányí yì diǎn ma?
sentences.english: Can the rent be a little cheaper?

sentences.chinese: 春天去旅行是不是比夏天舒服得多?
sentences.pinyin: Chūntiān qù lǚxíng shì bú shì bǐ xiàtiān shūfú de duō?
sentences.english: Is traveling in spring much more comfortable than in summer?

sentences.chinese: 高鐵票比火車票貴多了嗎？
sentences.pinyin: Gāotiě piào bǐ huǒchē piào guì duō le ma?
sentences.english: Are high-speed rail tickets much more expensive than train tickets?

sentences.chinese: 他回了家以後，就開始工作。
sentences.pinyin: Tā huí le jiā yǐhòu, jiù kāishǐ gōngzuò.
sentences.english: After he got home, he started working.

sentences.chinese: 我昨天下了課就跟朋友去看電影。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān xià le kè jiù gēn péngyǒu qù kàn diànyǐng.
sentences.english: Yesterday, after class, I went to the movies with my friends.

sentences.chinese: 我想見你一面。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng jiàn nǐ yí miàn.
sentences.english: I want to meet you once.

sentences.chinese: 他照了你一張相。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zhào le nǐ yì zhāng xiàng.
sentences.english: He took a picture of you.

sentences.chinese: 我們每天上八個鐘頭的班。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen měitiān shàng bā ge zhōngtóu de bān.
sentences.english: We work eight hours a day.

sentences.chinese: 你們新年的時候，放幾天的假？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐmen xīnnián de shíhòu, fàng jǐ tiān de jià?
sentences.english: How many days off do you have for New Year?

sentences.chinese: 他唱了三小時的歌，有一點累。
sentences.pinyin: Tā chàng le sān xiǎoshí de gē, yǒu yì diǎn lèi.
sentences.english: He sang for three hours and was a little tired.
